
#GO term enrichment analysis. HERE IT IS APPLIED ON THE ENTIRE DATASET, WHICH DOES NOT MAKE SENSE. i LEAVE IT BECAUSE IT CAN STILL BE USEFULL TO MAKE BAR PLOTS OR SEE HOW TO DO ENRICHMENT ANALYSIS. 

#Go term enrichement analysis. The enricher() function is enrichment analyzer that takes in a list of genes and performs enrichment analysis to identify overrepresented functional categories. The statistical test is a hypergeometric test that determine whether a particular set of genes is overrepresented in a specific term compared to what would be expected by chance. 
#The hypergeometric test is a Fisher test. So it is a contingency analysis on categorical variables, that determines if two categorical variables are associated if the enrichement is particularly high (can be studied more in depth)
#GO terms, like all the other annotations are a way to make sense of a database. Now we apply to all the proteins but we could apply it on specific sets of proteins (ex. MAP). 

```{r}
#Read our proteins and create a table for each variable, suitable for subsequent analysis. 
pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599 <- read_csv("../../R_Data/pGs_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS_anno.csv")
Table_BP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS<- pG_main_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS_anno %>%
  select("GO_Biological_Process_Hv","Hv_UP_entries") %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  mutate(GO_Biological_Process_Hv = str_extract(GO_Biological_Process_Hv, "^[^\\+"))
Table_CC_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS<- pG_main_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS_anno %>%
  select("GO_Cellular_Component_Hv","Hv_UP_entries") %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  mutate(GO_Cellular_Component_Hv = str_extract(GO_Cellular_Component_Hv, "^[^\\[]+"))
Table_MF_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS<- pG_main_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS_anno %>%
  select("GO_Molecular_Function_Hv","Hv_UP_entries") %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  mutate(GO_Molecular_Function_Hv = str_extract(GO_Molecular_Function_Hv, "^[^\\[]+"))

#Load package for clusterProfiler and perform the function. Despite being very permissive, no enrichment of terms was found...We still do the graphical representation. 
GOBP_enrich_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS<-enricher(Table_BP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS$Hv_UP_entries, TERM2GENE=Table_BP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS[,c("GO_Biological_Process_Hv","Hv_UP_entries")], pvalueCutoff = 1, pAdjustMethod = "none", minGSSize = 1, maxGSSize = Inf, qvalueCutoff = 1)
Term2CountBP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS <-GOBP_enrich_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS@result[, c("Description", "Count")]
Term2CountBP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS$Description <- gsub("\\[.*\\]", "", Term2CountBP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS$Description) # Remove text between square brackets
Term2CountBP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS <- Term2CountBP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS[order(-Term2CountBP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS$Count),]
Term2CountBP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS <- head(Term2CountBP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS, n = 10)

GOCC_enrich_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS<-enricher(Table_CC_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS$Hv_UP_entries, TERM2GENE=Table_CC_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS[,c("GO_Cellular_Component_Hv","Hv_UP_entries")], pvalueCutoff = 1, pAdjustMethod = "none", minGSSize = 1, maxGSSize = Inf, qvalueCutoff = 1)
Term2CountCC_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS <-GOCC_enrich_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS@result[, c("Description", "Count")]
Term2CountCC_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS$Description <- gsub("\\[.*\\]", "", Term2CountCC_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS$Description) # Remove text between square brackets
Term2CountCC_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS <- Term2CountCC_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS[order(-Term2CountCC_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS$Count),]
Term2CountCC_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS <- head(Term2CountCC_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS, n = 10)

GOMF_enrich_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS<-enricher(Table_MF_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS$Hv_UP_entries, TERM2GENE=Table_MF_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS[,c("GO_Molecular_Function_Hv","Hv_UP_entries")], pvalueCutoff = 1, pAdjustMethod = "none", minGSSize = 1, maxGSSize = Inf, qvalueCutoff = 1)
Term2CountMF_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS <-GOMF_enrich_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS@result[, c("Description", "Count")]
Term2CountMF_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS$Description <- gsub("\\[.*\\]", "", Term2CountMF_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS$Description) # Remove text between square brackets
Term2CountMF_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS <- Term2CountMF_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS[order(-Term2CountMF_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS$Count),]
Term2CountMF_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS <- head(Term2CountMF_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS, n = 10)
```

# Plot bar plot, for each GO annotation. For now it is not bad. We have now to it also for the other processes. Then we can modify and improve it again. Then we have to do the profile plot 

```{r}
BPPlot_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS<-ggplot(Term2CountBP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS, aes(x=reorder(Description, Count), y=Count, fill="Description")) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", color="black", width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep("#25A535", nrow(Term2CountBP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS))) +
  coord_flip() +
   labs(title = "Gene Ontology Biological Process (GOBP)(HvGerm_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS)",
       x = "GOBP description",
       y = "Counts") +
  theme_classic () +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, family = "", face = "plain"),  
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12, family = "", face = "plain"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12, family = "", face = "plain")) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 1.8, margin = margin(b = 10)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
BPPlot_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS
ggsave("../../R_export/BPPlot_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS.png")

CCPlot_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS<-ggplot(Term2CountCC_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS, aes(x=reorder(Description, Count), y=Count, fill="Description")) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", color="black", width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep("#105CB6", nrow(Term2CountBP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS))) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Gene Ontology Cellular Component (GOCC)(HvGerm_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS)",
       x = "GOCC description",
       y = "Counts") +
  theme_classic () +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, family = "", face = "plain"),  
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12, family = "", face = "plain"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12, family = "", face = "plain")) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 1.8, margin = margin(b = 10)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
CCPlot_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS
ggsave("../../R_export/CCPlot_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS.png")

MFplot_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS<-ggplot(Term2CountMF_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS, aes(x=reorder(Description, Count), y=Count, fill="Description")) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", color="black", width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rep("#A80000", nrow(Term2CountBP_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS))) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Gene Ontology Molecular Function (GOMF)(HvGerm_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS)",
       x = "GOMF description",
       y = "Counts") +
  theme_classic () +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, family = "", face = "plain"),  
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12, family = "", face = "plain"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12, family = "", face = "plain")) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 1.8, margin = margin(b = 10)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
MFplot_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS
ggsave("../../R_export/MFPlot_HvGerm_Exp3_TD_HS.png")

```

#HEAT MAP of subsets of genes. 
- Idea: targeted analysis that focuses on finding differences between genotypes regarding genes of which we know potentially to be involved in confering differences between varieties  
- Approach: our annotation file is always the same (Beatrice_BK_AA_HS). At transcriptional level we built gene IDs. These gene IDs have to be checked in all the datasets that we produce. 
- Expected outcome: differences in the abundance of these genes in different time point or varieties
-updated to 06.03.2024
-Names of the genes are the same in the RNASeq. When A gene was identified at protein level but not at gene level was indicated with a higher number starting from the highest in the RNASeq dataset 


```{r}
#GA synth proteins in Barke proteome. (here there are all Barke proteins) ----

GAsynth_Barke_all <- BeatriceV3_Barke %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Ent-copalyl diphosphate|Kaurene synthase 1|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G590600.1|Ent-kaurene oxidase|Ent-kaurenoic|13-ox|GA20ox|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G401100.1|GA3ox", .)))

GAsynth_Barke_1 <- BeatriceV3_Barke %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Ent-copalyl diphosphate|Kaurene synthase 1|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G590600.1|Ent-kaurene oxidase|Ent-kaurenoic|13-ox|GA20ox|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G401100.1|GA3ox", .))) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_BK", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_BK", "Wheat_ProteinNames_BK", "Rice_ProteinNames_BK", "Maize_ProteinNames_BK", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_BK")%>%
  slice(1:8) %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(GAsynth_Barke_1, c("GA synthesis proteins in Barke proteome 1" = 6))
as_image(GAsynth_Barke_1, file = "../../R_export/GAsynth_Barke_proteome_1.png", height = 20, width = 20)

GAsynth_Barke_2 <- BeatriceV3_Barke %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Ent-copalyl diphosphate|Kaurene synthase 1|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G590600.1|Ent-kaurene oxidase|Ent-kaurenoic|13-ox|GA20ox|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G401100.1|GA3ox", .))) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_BK", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_BK", "Wheat_ProteinNames_BK", "Rice_ProteinNames_BK", "Maize_ProteinNames_BK", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_BK")%>%
  slice(9:17) %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(GAsynth_Barke_2, c("GA synthesis proteins in Barke proteome 2" = 6))
as_image(GAsynth_Barke_2, file = "../../R_export/GAsynth_Barke_proteome_2.png", height = 20, width = 20)

#GA synth proteins in HS proteome. (here there are all HS proteins but not all Barke proteins. This file is HS based so it could provide different output)
GAsynth_HS_all<- BeatriceV3_HordSpont %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Ent-copalyl diphosphate|Kaurene synthase 1|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G590600.1|Ent-kaurene oxidase|Ent-kaurenoic|13-ox|GA20ox|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G401100.1|GA3ox", .)))

GAsynth_HS_1 <- BeatriceV3_HordSpont %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Ent-copalyl diphosphate|Kaurene synthase 1|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G590600.1|Ent-kaurene oxidase|Ent-kaurenoic|13-ox|GA20ox|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G401100.1|GA3ox", .))) %>%
  select("HorSpont_OF_HS", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_HS", "Wheat_ProteinNames_HS", "Rice_ProteinNames_HS", "Maize_ProteinNames_HS", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_HS")%>%
  slice(1:8) %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(GAsynth_HS_1, c("GA synthesis proteins in HS proteome 1" = 6))
as_image(GAsynth_HS_1, file = "../../R_export/GAsynth_HS_proteome_1.png", height = 20, width = 20)

GAsynth_HS_2 <- BeatriceV3_HordSpont %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Ent-copalyl diphosphate|Kaurene synthase 1|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G590600.1|Ent-kaurene oxidase|Ent-kaurenoic|13-ox|GA20ox|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G401100.1|GA3ox", .))) %>%
  select("HorSpont_OF_HS", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_HS", "Wheat_ProteinNames_HS", "Rice_ProteinNames_HS", "Maize_ProteinNames_HS", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_HS")%>%
  slice(9:18) %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(GAsynth_HS_2, c("GA synthesis proteins in HS proteome 2" = 6))
as_image(GAsynth_HS_2, file = "../../R_export/GAsynth_HS_proteome_2.png", height = 20, width = 20)

#GA synth proteins in HS proteome. (here there are all HS proteins but not all Barke proteins. This file is HS based so it could provide different output)
GAsynth_H21599_all <- BeatriceV3_HOR21599 %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Ent-copalyl diphosphate|Kaurene synthase 1|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G590600.1|Ent-kaurene oxidase|Ent-kaurenoic|13-ox|GA20ox|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G401100.1|GA3ox", .)))

GAsynth_H21599_1 <- BeatriceV3_HOR21599 %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Ent-copalyl diphosphate|Kaurene synthase 1|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G590600.1|Ent-kaurene oxidase|Ent-kaurenoic|13-ox|GA20ox|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G401100.1|GA3ox", .))) %>%
  select("HOR21599_21599", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_21599", "Wheat_ProteinNames_21599", "Rice_ProteinNames_21599", "Maize_ProteinNames_21599", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_21599")%>%
  slice(1:8) %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(GAsynth_H21599_1, c("GA synthesis proteins in H21599 proteome 1" = 6))
as_image(GAsynth_H21599_1, file = "../../R_export/GAsynth_21599_proteome_1.png", height = 20, width = 20)

GAsynth_H21599_2 <- BeatriceV3_HOR21599 %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Ent-copalyl diphosphate|Kaurene synthase 1|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G590600.1|Ent-kaurene oxidase|Ent-kaurenoic|13-ox|GA20ox|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G401100.1|GA3ox", .))) %>%
  select("HOR21599_21599", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_21599", "Wheat_ProteinNames_21599", "Rice_ProteinNames_21599", "Maize_ProteinNames_21599", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_21599")%>%
  slice(9:18) %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(GAsynth_H21599_2, c("GA synthesis proteins in H21599 proteome 2" = 6))
as_image(GAsynth_H21599_2, file = "../../R_export/GAsynth_21599_proteome_2.png", height = 20, width = 20)

#List of GAsynth genes that are unique for each proteome species 
uniGAsynth_BK1 <- setdiff(GAsynth_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK, GAsynth_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS)
uniGAsynth_BK2 <- setdiff(GAsynth_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK, GAsynth_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599)

uniGAsynth_HS1 <- setdiff(GAsynth_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS, GAsynth_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK)
uniGAsynth_HS2 <- setdiff(GAsynth_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS, GAsynth_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599)

uniGAsynth_H21599_1 <- setdiff(GAsynth_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599, GAsynth_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS)
uniGAsynth_H21599_2 <- setdiff(GAsynth_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599, GAsynth_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK)

#GA synth proteins expressed during these time points of germination in the different varieties.  ----
#Load the right dataset
pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_HM <- read_csv("../../../R_Data/Hv3_TD2/pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599.csv") %>%
  select(1, 4:18, 19:24, 29:31, 36:38, 43:45, 50:52) %>% #grab the right cols
  mutate(rowMean = rowMeans(select(., 2:16), na.rm = TRUE), #calculate row wise sd and mean 
         rowSd = apply(select(., 2:16), 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE))
# Subtract row mean and divide by row standard deviation for each value in columns 2 to 16
for (i in 2:16) {
  col_name <- colnames(pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_HM)[i]
  pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_HM <- pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_HM %>%
    mutate(!!col_name := (get(col_name) - rowMean) / rowSd)
}
write.csv(pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_HM, file = "../../../R_Data/Hv3_TD2/pG_Hv3TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_zscored.csv", row.names = FALSE)

GAsynth_all_exp <- pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_HM %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Ent-copalyl diphosphate|Kaurene synthase 1|Ent-kaurene oxidase|Horvu_BARKE_7H01G024000.1|Horvu_BARKE_7H01G106100.1|GA 13-oxidase 1|GA20ox|GA3ox", .))) %>%
  mutate(Protein = c("ENT-KAO*", "CPS", "ENT-KO*", "GA20ox3")) 

HM_colors <- c("cornflowerblue", "ivory", "red3")

#Create a long dataframe with adding also a value variety to facet 
conditions <- c("Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD_100", 
                "Reporter.intensity.corrected.2.Hv3_TD_100", 
                "Reporter.intensity.corrected.3.Hv3_TD_100", 
                "Reporter.intensity.corrected.4.Hv3_TD_100", 
                "Reporter.intensity.corrected.5.Hv3_TD_100", 
                "Reporter.intensity.corrected.6.Hv3_TD_100", 
                "Reporter.intensity.corrected.7.Hv3_TD_100", 
                "Reporter.intensity.corrected.8.Hv3_TD_100", 
                "Reporter.intensity.corrected.9.Hv3_TD_100", 
                "Reporter.intensity.corrected.10.Hv3_TD_100", 
                "Reporter.intensity.corrected.11.Hv3_TD_100", 
                "Reporter.intensity.corrected.12.Hv3_TD_100", 
                "Reporter.intensity.corrected.13.Hv3_TD_100", 
                "Reporter.intensity.corrected.14.Hv3_TD_100", 
                "Reporter.intensity.corrected.15.Hv3_TD_100")
GAsynth_all_exp_long <- GAsynth_all_exp %>%
  reshape2::melt(id.vars = c("Protein"),
                 measure.vars = c("Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.2.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.3.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.4.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.5.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.6.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.7.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.8.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.9.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.10.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.11.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.12.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.13.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.14.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.15.Hv3_TD_100"), 
                 variable.name = "Time_Points", value.name = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Variety = case_when(
    Time_Points %in% conditions[1:5] ~ "AA",
    Time_Points %in% conditions[6:10] ~ "HS",
    Time_Points %in% conditions[11:15] ~ "BK"))
GAsynth_all_exp_long <- GAsynth_all_exp_long %>%
  mutate(Variety = factor(Variety, levels = c("HS", "AA", "BK")))

GAsynth_all_exp_long$Value <- as.numeric(GAsynth_all_exp_long$Value) #convert Value in continues values
GAsynth_all_exp_long$Protein <- factor(GAsynth_all_exp_long$Protein, levels = rev (c("CPS", "ENT-KAO*", "ENT-KO*", "GA20ox3"))) #specify a precise order in my proteins 

GAsynth_all_exp_HM<-ggplot(GAsynth_all_exp_long, aes(x = Time_Points, y = Protein)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = Value), colour="darkgrey") +
  scale_fill_gradientn (colors = HM_colors, na.value = "white") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs",  "0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs" , "0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs")) +
  labs(title = "GA biosynthesis", 
       x = "", 
       y = "",
       fill = "zScore")+
  facet_wrap(~Variety, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +  # Separate by groups
  theme_classic()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, family = "Arial", face = "plain"),  
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 6, family = "Arial", face = "plain"),  # Set same font for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 6, family = "Arial", face = "plain")) +  # Set same font for legend text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Update hjust value
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 5, family = "", face = "plain"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 5),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm"), # Adjust the size of the legend key here
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, vjust = 0.9, hjust = 1)) # Rotate X-axis labels
ggsave("../../R_export/Hv3_TD2/GAsynth_Hv3TD2_HM.png", dpi = 300, width = 6, height = 2.8, scale = 0.7)

#Genes involved in GA catabolism 

#GA synth proteins in Barke proteome. (here there are all Barke proteins) ----
GAcata_Barke_all <- BeatriceV3_Barke %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("GA2ox|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G184900.1|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G437700.1", .)))

GAcata_Barke <- BeatriceV3_Barke %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("GA2ox|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G184900.1|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G437700.1", .))) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_BK", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_BK", "Wheat_ProteinNames_BK", "Rice_ProteinNames_BK", "Maize_ProteinNames_BK", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_BK")%>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(GAcata_Barke, c("GA catabolism proteins in Barke proteome" = 6))
as_image(GAcata_Barke, file = "../../R_export/GAcata_Barke_all.png", height = 21, width = 20)


#GA synth proteins in HS proteome. (here there are all HS proteins but not all Barke proteins. This file is HS based so it could provide different output)
GAcata_HS_all<- BeatriceV3_HordSpont %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("GA2ox|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G184900.1|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G437700.1", .)))

GAcata_HS <- BeatriceV3_HordSpont %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("GA2ox|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G184900.1|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G437700.1", .))) %>%
  select("HorSpont_OF_HS", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_HS", "Wheat_ProteinNames_HS", "Rice_ProteinNames_HS", "Maize_ProteinNames_HS", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_HS")%>%
  slice(1:8) %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(GAcata_HS, c("GA catabolism proteins in Barke proteome" = 6))
as_image(GAcata_HS, file = "../../R_export/GAcata_HS_all.png", height = 20, width = 20)


#GA synth proteins in HS proteome. (here there are all HS proteins but not all Barke proteins. This file is HS based so it could provide different output)
GAcata_H21599_all <- BeatriceV3_HOR21599 %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("GA2ox|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G184900.1|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G437700.1", .)))

GAcata_H21599 <- BeatriceV3_HOR21599 %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("GA2ox|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G184900.1|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G437700.1", .))) %>%
  select("HOR21599_21599", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_21599", "Wheat_ProteinNames_21599", "Rice_ProteinNames_21599", "Maize_ProteinNames_21599", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_21599")%>%
  slice(1:8) %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(GAcata_H21599, c("GA catabolism proteins in Barke proteome" = 6))
as_image(GAcata_H21599, file = "../../R_export/GAcata_21599_all.png", height = 20, width = 20)


#List of GAcata genes that are unique for each proteome species 
uniGAcata_BK1 <- setdiff(GAcata_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK, GAcata_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS)
uniGAcata_BK2 <- setdiff(GAcata_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK, GAcata_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599)

uniGAcata_HS1 <- setdiff(GAcata_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS, GAcata_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK)
uniGAcata_HS2 <- setdiff(GAcata_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS, GAcata_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599)

uniGAcata_H21599_1 <- setdiff(GAcata_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599, GAcata_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS)
uniGAcata_H21599_2 <- setdiff(GAcata_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599, GAcata_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK)

#GA cata proteins expressed during these time points of germination in the different varieties.  ----
GAcata_all_exp <- pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_HM %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("GA2ox|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G184900.1|Horvu_BARKE_1H01G437700.1", .))) %>%
  mutate(Protein = c("GA2ox5", "EUI*"))
  

HM_colors <- c("cornflowerblue", "ivory", "red3")

GAcata_all_exp_long <- GAcata_all_exp %>%
  reshape2::melt(id.vars = c("Protein"),
           measure.vars = c("Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.2.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.3.Hv3_TD_100", 
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.4.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.5.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.6.Hv3_TD_100", 
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.7.Hv3_TD_100" , "Reporter.intensity.corrected.8.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.9.Hv3_TD_100" ,
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.10.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.11.Hv3_TD_100" ,"Reporter.intensity.corrected.12.Hv3_TD_100",
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.13.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.14.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.15.Hv3_TD_100"), 
           variable.name = "Time_Points", value.name = "Value")%>%
  mutate(Variety = case_when(
    Time_Points %in% conditions[1:5] ~ "AA",
    Time_Points %in% conditions[6:10] ~ "HS",
    Time_Points %in% conditions[11:15] ~ "BK"))

GAcata_all_exp_long <- GAcata_all_exp_long %>%
  mutate(Variety = factor(Variety, levels = c("HS", "AA", "BK")))
GAcata_all_exp_long$Value <- as.numeric(GAcata_all_exp_long$Value) #convert Value in continues values
GAcata_all_exp_long$Protein <- factor(GAcata_all_exp_long$Protein, levels = rev (c("GA2ox5", "EUI*"))) #specify a precise order in my proteins 

GAcata_all_exp_HM<-ggplot(GAcata_all_exp_long, aes(x = Time_Points, y = Protein)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = Value), colour="darkgrey") +
  scale_fill_gradientn (colors = HM_colors, na.value = "white") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs",  "0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs" , "0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs")) +
  labs(title = "GA catabolism", 
       x = "", 
       y = "",
       fill = "z-score")+
  facet_wrap(~Variety, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +  # Separate by groups
  theme_classic()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, family = "Arial", face = "plain"),  
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 6, family = "Arial", face = "plain"),  # Set same font for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 6, family = "Arial", face = "plain")) +  # Set same font for legend text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Update hjust value
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 5, family = "", face = "plain"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 5),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm"), # Adjust the size of the legend key here
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, vjust = 0.9, hjust = 1)) # Rotate X-axis labels
ggsave("../../R_export/Hv3_TD2/Acata_AA_HS_H21599_HM.png", dpi = 300, width = 5, height = 1.8, scale = 0.8)

#Genes involved in GA path 

#GA path proteins in Barke proteome. (here there are all Barke proteins) ----
GApath_Barke_all <- BeatriceV3_Barke %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Horvu_BARKE_1H01G383900.1|Horvu_BARKE_4H01G043200.1|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G469300.1", .)))

GApath_Barke <- BeatriceV3_Barke %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Horvu_BARKE_1H01G383900.1|Horvu_BARKE_4H01G043200.1|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G469300.1", .))) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_BK", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_BK", "Wheat_ProteinNames_BK", "Rice_ProteinNames_BK", "Maize_ProteinNames_BK", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_BK")%>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(GApath_Barke, c("GA path proteins in Barke proteome" = 6))
as_image(GApath_Barke, file = "../../R_export/GApath_Barke_all.png", height = 21, width = 20)


#GA path proteins in HS proteome. 
GApath_HS_all<- BeatriceV3_HordSpont %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Horvu_BARKE_1H01G383900.1|Horvu_BARKE_4H01G043200.1|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G469300.1", .)))

GApath_HS <- BeatriceV3_HordSpont %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Horvu_BARKE_1H01G383900.1|Horvu_BARKE_4H01G043200.1|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G469300.1", .))) %>%
  select("HorSpont_OF_HS", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_HS", "Wheat_ProteinNames_HS", "Rice_ProteinNames_HS", "Maize_ProteinNames_HS", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_HS")%>%
  slice(1:8) %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(GApath_HS, c("GA path proteins in Barke proteome" = 6))
as_image(GApath_HS, file = "../../R_export/GApath_HS_all.png", height = 20, width = 20)


#GA path proteins in HS proteome. 
GApath_H21599_all <- BeatriceV3_HOR21599 %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Horvu_BARKE_1H01G383900.1|Horvu_BARKE_4H01G043200.1|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G469300.1", .)))

GApath_H21599 <- BeatriceV3_HOR21599 %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Horvu_BARKE_1H01G383900.1|Horvu_BARKE_4H01G043200.1|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G469300.1", .))) %>%
  select("HOR21599_21599", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_21599", "Wheat_ProteinNames_21599", "Rice_ProteinNames_21599", "Maize_ProteinNames_21599", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_21599")%>%
  slice(1:8) %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(GApath_H21599, c("GA path proteins in Barke proteome" = 6))
as_image(GApath_H21599, file = "../../R_export/GApath_21599_all.png", height = 20, width = 20)


#List of GApath genes that are unique for each proteome species 
uniGApath_BK1 <- setdiff(GApath_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK, GApath_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS)
uniGApath_BK2 <- setdiff(GApath_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK, GApath_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599)

uniGApath_HS1 <- setdiff(GApath_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS, GApath_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK)
uniGApath_HS2 <- setdiff(GApath_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS, GApath_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599)

uniGApath_H21599_1 <- setdiff(GApath_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599, GApath_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS)
uniGApath_H21599_2 <- setdiff(GApath_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599, GApath_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK)

#GA path proteins expressed during these time points of germination in the different varieties.  ----
GApath_all_exp <- pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_HM %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Horvu_BARKE_1H01G383900.1|Horvu_BARKE_4H01G043200.1|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G469300.1", .))) 
  

HM_colors <- c("cornflowerblue", "ivory", "red3")

GApath_all_exp_long <- GApath_all_exp %>%
  reshape2::melt(id.vars = c("Protein"),
           measure.vars = c("Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.2.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.3.Hv3_TD_100", 
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.4.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.5.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.6.Hv3_TD_100", 
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.7.Hv3_TD_100" , "Reporter.intensity.corrected.8.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.9.Hv3_TD_100" ,
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.10.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.11.Hv3_TD_100" ,"Reporter.intensity.corrected.12.Hv3_TD_100",
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.13.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.14.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.15.Hv3_TD_100"), 
           variable.name = "Time_Points", value.name = "Value")
GApath_all_exp_long$Value <- as.numeric(GApath_all_exp_long$Value) #convert Value in continues values

GApath_all_exp_long$Protein <- factor(GApath_all_exp_long$Protein, levels = rev (c("GA2ox5", "EUI*"))) #specify a precise order in my proteins 

GApath_all_exp_HM<-ggplot(GApath_all_exp_long, aes(x = Time_Points, y = Protein)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = Value), colour="white") +
  scale_fill_gradientn (colors = HM_colors, na.value = "white") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0hs_AA",  "24hs_AA",  "48hs_AA", "72hs_AA",  "96hs_AA",  "0hs_HS",  "24hs_HS",  "48hs_HS", "72hs_HS",  "96hs_HS" , "0hs_BK",  "24hs_BK",  "48hs_BK", "72hs_BK",  "96hs_BK")) +
  facet_wrap(~Variety, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +  # Separate by groups

  labs(title = "GA path", 
       x = "", 
       y = "", 
       fill="log2_intensity")+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, family = "", face = "plain"),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 6, family = "", face = "plain"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm"), # Adjust the size of the legend key here
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8, family = "", face = "plain"),  # Set same font for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8, family = "", face = "plain")) +  # Set same font for legend text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Update hjust value
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, vjust = 0.9, hjust = 1)) # Rotate X-axis labels
ggsave("../../R_export/GApath_AA_HS_H21599_HM.png", dpi = 300, width = 5, height = 1.9, scale=0.9)


#Genes involved in malting features: amylolysis (Giessinger 2021 and search by name). limit destrinasi una, beta e alpha molte, 

#amylolysis proteins in Barke proteome. (here there are all Barke proteins) ----
amylolysis_Barke_all <- BeatriceV3_Barke %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Alpha-amylase \\(EC 3.2.1.1\\)|Beta-amylase \\(EC 3.2.1.2\\)|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G737000.1|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G024900.1|Horvu_BARKE_7H01G615100.1|O48541_HORVV", .)))

amylolysis_Barke <- BeatriceV3_Barke %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Alpha-amylase \\(EC 3.2.1.1\\)|Beta-amylase \\(EC 3.2.1.2\\)|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G737000.1|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G024900.1|Horvu_BARKE_7H01G615100.1|O48541_HORVV", .))) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_BK", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_BK", "Wheat_ProteinNames_BK", "Rice_ProteinNames_BK", "Maize_ProteinNames_BK", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_BK")%>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(amylolysis_Barke, c("amylolysis proteins in Barke proteome" = 6))
as_image(amylolysis_Barke, file = "../../R_export/amylolysis_Barke_all.png", height = 40, width = 10)


#amylolysis proteins in HS proteome. (here there are all HS proteins but not all Barke proteins. This file is HS based so it could provide different output)
amylolysis_HS_all<- BeatriceV3_HordSpont %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Alpha-amylase \\(EC 3.2.1.1\\)|Beta-amylase \\(EC 3.2.1.2\\)|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G737000.1|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G024900.1|Horvu_BARKE_7H01G615100.1|O48541_HORVV", .)))

amylolysis_HS <- BeatriceV3_HordSpont %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Alpha-amylase \\(EC 3.2.1.1\\)|Beta-amylase \\(EC 3.2.1.2\\)|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G737000.1|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G024900.1|Horvu_BARKE_7H01G615100.1|O48541_HORVV", .))) %>%
  select("HorSpont_OF_HS", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_HS", "Wheat_ProteinNames_HS", "Rice_ProteinNames_HS", "Maize_ProteinNames_HS", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_HS")%>%
  slice(1:8) %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(amylolysis_HS, c("amylolysis proteins in Barke proteome" = 6))
as_image(amylolysis_HS, file = "../../R_export/amylolysis_HS_all.png", height = 20, width = 20)


#GA synth proteins in HS proteome. (here there are all HS proteins but not all Barke proteins. This file is HS based so it could provide different output)
amylolysis_H21599_all <- BeatriceV3_HOR21599 %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Alpha-amylase \\(EC 3.2.1.1\\)|Beta-amylase \\(EC 3.2.1.2\\)|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G737000.1|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G024900.1|Horvu_BARKE_7H01G615100.1|O48541_HORVV", .)))

amylolysis_H21599 <- BeatriceV3_HOR21599 %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Alpha-amylase \\(EC 3.2.1.1\\)|Beta-amylase \\(EC 3.2.1.2\\)|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G737000.1|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G024900.1|Horvu_BARKE_7H01G615100.1|O48541_HORVV", .))) %>%
  select("HOR21599_21599", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames_21599", "Wheat_ProteinNames_21599", "Rice_ProteinNames_21599", "Maize_ProteinNames_21599", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames_21599")%>%
  slice(1:8) %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)%>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "cornflowerblue", color = "white")
add_header_above(amylolysis_H21599, c("amylolysis proteins in Barke proteome" = 6))
as_image(amylolysis_H21599, file = "../../R_export/amylolysis_21599_all.png", height = 20, width = 20)


#List of amylolysis genes that are unique for each proteome species 
uniamylolysis_BK1 <- setdiff(amylolysis_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK, amylolysis_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS)
uniamylolysis_BK2 <- setdiff(amylolysis_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK, amylolysis_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599)

uniamylolysis_HS1 <- setdiff(amylolysis_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS, amylolysis_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK)
uniamylolysis_HS2 <- setdiff(amylolysis_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS, amylolysis_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599)

uniamylolysis_H21599_1 <- setdiff(amylolysis_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599, amylolysis_HS_all$Barke_Pg_HS)
uniamylolysis_H21599_2 <- setdiff(amylolysis_H21599_all$Barke_Pg_21599, amylolysis_Barke_all$Barke_Pg_BK)

#amylolysis proteins expressed during these time points of germination in the different varieties.  ----
amylolysis_all_exp <- pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_HM %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Alpha-amylase \\(EC 3.2.1.1\\)|Beta-amylase \\(EC 3.2.1.2\\)|Horvu_BARKE_2H01G737000.1|Horvu_BARKE_3H01G024900.1|Horvu_BARKE_7H01G615100.1|O48541_HORVV", .))) %>%
  mutate(Protein = c("Alpha-amylase (8)", "Alpha-amylase (7)","Alpha-amylase (4)", "Alpha-amylase (3)","Beta-amylase (9)", 	
"Alpha-glucosidase (2)", "Alpha-amylase (6)", "Limit-dextrinase", "Alpha-glucosidase (1)", "Alpha-amylase (9)","Beta-amylase (6)", "Beta-amylase (5)", "Beta-amylase (10)"))
  
HM_colors <- c("cornflowerblue", "ivory", "red3")

amylolysis_all_exp_long <- amylolysis_all_exp %>%
  reshape2::melt(id.vars = c("Protein"),
           measure.vars = c("Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.2.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.3.Hv3_TD_100", 
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.4.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.5.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.6.Hv3_TD_100", 
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.7.Hv3_TD_100" , "Reporter.intensity.corrected.8.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.9.Hv3_TD_100" ,
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.10.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.11.Hv3_TD_100" ,"Reporter.intensity.corrected.12.Hv3_TD_100",
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.13.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.14.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.15.Hv3_TD_100"), 
           variable.name = "Time_Points", value.name = "Value")%>%
  mutate(Variety = case_when(
    Time_Points %in% conditions[1:5] ~ "Arabi Aswad",
    Time_Points %in% conditions[6:10] ~ "H.spontaneum",
    Time_Points %in% conditions[11:15] ~ "Barke"))

amylolysis_all_exp_long <- amylolysis_all_exp_long %>%
  mutate(Variety = factor(Variety, levels = c("H.spontaneum", "Arabi Aswad", "Barke")))
amylolysis_all_exp_long$Value <- as.numeric(amylolysis_all_exp_long$Value) #convert Value in continues values
amylolysis_all_exp_long$Protein <- factor(amylolysis_all_exp_long$Protein, levels = rev (c( "Alpha-amylase (3)","Alpha-amylase (4)","Alpha-amylase (6)","Alpha-amylase (7)", "Alpha-amylase (8)","Alpha-amylase (9)","Beta-amylase (5)",  "Beta-amylase (6)","Beta-amylase (9)", 	 "Beta-amylase (10)",
"Alpha-glucosidase (1)","Alpha-glucosidase (2)",  "Limit-dextrinase")))

amylolysis_all_exp_HM <- ggplot(amylolysis_all_exp_long, aes(x = Time_Points, y = Protein)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = Value), colour = "darkgrey") +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = HM_colors, na.value = "white", 
                       guide = guide_colorbar(frame.colour = "darkgrey", frame.linewidth = 0.2, 
                                              ticks.colour = "darkgrey", ticks.linewidth = 0.2)) +  # Add border to legend bar
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs",  "0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs", 
                              "0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs")) +
  labs(title = "Amylolysis", 
       x = "", 
       y = "", 
       fill = "z-score") +
  facet_wrap(~Variety, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +  # Separate by groups
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8, family = "Arial", face = "plain"),  
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 6, family = "Arial", face = "plain"),  # Set same font for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 6, family = "Arial", face = "plain")) +  # Set same font for legend text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Update hjust value
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 6, family = "", face = "plain"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm"), # Adjust the size of the legend key here
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, vjust = 0.9, hjust = 1)) # Rotate X-axis labels

ggsave("../../../R_export/Hv3_TD2/Amylolysis_AA_HS_H21599_HM.png", dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 5.7, scale = 0.5)
ggsave("../../../R_export/Hv3_TD2/Amylolysis_AA_HS_H21599_HM.svg", dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 5.7, scale = 0.5)


#cytolysis proteins expressed during these time points of germination in the different varieties.  ----

cytolysis_all_exp <- pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_HM %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("\\(EC 3.2.1.4\\)|\\(EC 3.2.1.39\\)|Endo-1,4-beta-xylanase|Exoglucanase", .))) %>%
  mutate(Protein = c("Endohydrolase (13)", "Endohydrolase (21)", "Endohydrolase (22)", "Endoglucanase (5)",  "Endoglucanase (10)", "Endoglucanase (14)", "Endoglucanase (6)", "Endoglucanase (1)","Endoglucanase (3)","Endohydrolase (8)", "Endohydrolase (6)", "Endohydrolase (20)", "Endoglucanase (12)", "Endohydrolase (11)", "Endohydrolase (16)", "Endohydrolase (23)",  "Endohydrolase (4)", "Endohydrolase (24)", "Endoglucanase (9)" , "Endohydrolase (7)")) %>%
  slice(-c(5,11))
HM_colors <- c("cornflowerblue", "ivory", "red3")

cytolysis_all_exp_long <- cytolysis_all_exp %>%
  reshape2::melt(id.vars = c("Protein"),
           measure.vars = c("Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.2.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.3.Hv3_TD_100", 
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.4.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.5.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.6.Hv3_TD_100", 
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.7.Hv3_TD_100" , "Reporter.intensity.corrected.8.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.9.Hv3_TD_100" ,
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.10.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.11.Hv3_TD_100" ,"Reporter.intensity.corrected.12.Hv3_TD_100",
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.13.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.14.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.15.Hv3_TD_100"), 
           variable.name = "Time_Points", value.name = "Value")%>%
  mutate(Variety = case_when(
    Time_Points %in% conditions[1:5] ~ "Arabi Aswad",
    Time_Points %in% conditions[6:10] ~ "H.spontaneum",
    Time_Points %in% conditions[11:15] ~ "Barke"))

cytolysis_all_exp_long <- cytolysis_all_exp_long %>%
  mutate(Variety = factor(Variety, levels = c("H.spontaneum", "Arabi Aswad", "Barke")))
cytolysis_all_exp_long$Value <- as.numeric(cytolysis_all_exp_long$Value) #convert Value in continues values
cytolysis_all_exp_long$Protein <- factor(cytolysis_all_exp_long$Protein, levels = rev (c( "Endoglucanase (1)", "Endoglucanase (5)", "Endoglucanase (6)","Endoglucanase (9)" , "Endoglucanase (12)","Endoglucanase (14)",  "Endoglucanase (3)", "Endohydrolase (4)", "Endohydrolase (7)","Endohydrolase (8)", "Endohydrolase (11)", "Endohydrolase (13)","Endohydrolase (16)","Endohydrolase (20)",  "Endohydrolase (21)", "Endohydrolase (22)" , "Endohydrolase (23)",  "Endohydrolase (24)"  )))

cytolysis_all_exp_HM<-ggplot(cytolysis_all_exp_long, aes(x = Time_Points, y = Protein)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = Value), colour = "darkgrey") +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = HM_colors, na.value = "white", 
                       guide = guide_colorbar(frame.colour = "darkgrey", frame.linewidth = 0.2, 
                                              ticks.colour = "darkgrey", ticks.linewidth = 0.2)) +  # Add border to
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs",  "0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs" , "0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs")) +
  labs(title = "Cytolysis", 
       x = "", 
       y = "", 
       fill="z-score")+
  facet_wrap(~Variety, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +  # Separate by groups
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8, family = "Arial", face = "plain"),  
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 6, family = "Arial", face = "plain"),  # Set same font for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 6, family = "Arial", face = "plain")) +  # Set same font for legend text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Update hjust value
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 6, family = "", face = "plain"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm"), # Adjust the size of the legend key here
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, vjust = 0.9, hjust = 1)) # Rotate X-axis labels
ggsave("../../../R_export/Hv3_TD2/cytolysis_AA_HS_H21599_HM.png", dpi = 300, width = 7.3, height = 6, scale = 0.55)
ggsave("../../../R_export/Hv3_TD2/cytolysis_AA_HS_H21599_HM.svg", dpi = 300, width = 7.3, height = 6, scale = 0.55)


#Proteolysis proteins expressed during these time points of germination in the different varieties.  ----
proteolysis_all_exp <- pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_HM %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Cysteine protease|Aspartic proteinase|Carboxypeptidase|Aminopeptidase", .))) %>%
  mutate(Protein = c("Aminopeptidase (7)", "Aspartic proteinase (5)", "Carboxypeptidase (7)", "Carboxypeptidase (31)", "Aminopeptidase (5)", "Carboxypeptidase (32)", "Carboxypeptidase (26)", "Cysteine proteinase (3)", "Aminopeptidase (4)", "Carboxypeptidase (16)", "Carboxypeptidase (33)", "Carboxypeptidase (34)", "Carboxypeptidase (35)", "Carboxypeptidase (2)","Metalloprotease (1)","Carboxypeptidase (22)", "Carboxypeptidase (36)",  "Carboxypeptidase (12)", "Aspartic proteinase (2)", "Carboxypeptidase (8)", "Aspartic proteinase (1)", "Aminopeptidase (1)", "Aspartic protease (3)", "Aminopeptidase (2)", "Aminopeptidase (11)", "Carboxypeptidase (38)", "Cysteine protease (2)", "Carboxypeptidase (30)", "Carboxypeptidase (23)", "Carboxypeptidase (10)", "Aspartic proteinase (4)", "Aminopeptidase (6)", "Cysteine protease (5)", "Carboxypeptidase (37)", "Carboxypeptidase (14)", "Carboxypeptidase (11)","Cysteine protease (1)","Aminopeptidase (8)", "Aspartic proteinase (6)", "Carboxypeptidase (24)", "Carboxypeptidase (21)")) %>%
  slice(-c(1,3,5,6,11,15,17,18,34,40))

  
HM_colors <- c("cornflowerblue", "ivory", "red3")

proteolysis_all_exp_long <- proteolysis_all_exp %>%
  reshape2::melt(id.vars = c("Protein"),
           measure.vars = c("Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.2.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.3.Hv3_TD_100", 
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.4.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.5.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.6.Hv3_TD_100", 
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.7.Hv3_TD_100" , "Reporter.intensity.corrected.8.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.9.Hv3_TD_100" ,
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.10.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.11.Hv3_TD_100" ,"Reporter.intensity.corrected.12.Hv3_TD_100",
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.13.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.14.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.15.Hv3_TD_100"), 
           variable.name = "Time_Points", value.name = "Value")%>%
  mutate(Variety = case_when(
    Time_Points %in% conditions[1:5] ~ "Arabi Aswad",
    Time_Points %in% conditions[6:10] ~ "H.spontaneum",
    Time_Points %in% conditions[11:15] ~ "Barke"))

proteolysis_all_exp_long <- proteolysis_all_exp_long %>%
  mutate(Variety = factor(Variety, levels = c("H.spontaneum", "Arabi Aswad", "Barke")))
proteolysis_all_exp_long$Value <- as.numeric(proteolysis_all_exp_long$Value) #convert Value in continues values
proteolysis_all_exp_long$Protein <- factor(proteolysis_all_exp_long$Protein, levels = rev (c("Carboxypeptidase (2)", "Carboxypeptidase (8)","Carboxypeptidase (10)", "Carboxypeptidase (11)","Carboxypeptidase (14)", "Carboxypeptidase (16)", "Carboxypeptidase (21)","Carboxypeptidase (22)","Carboxypeptidase (23)","Carboxypeptidase (26)", "Carboxypeptidase (30)","Carboxypeptidase (31)",   "Carboxypeptidase (34)", "Carboxypeptidase (35)", "Carboxypeptidase (38)", "Aminopeptidase (1)","Aminopeptidase (2)","Aminopeptidase (4)","Aminopeptidase (6)","Aminopeptidase (8)", "Aminopeptidase (11)",   "Aspartic proteinase (1)", "Aspartic proteinase (2)", "Aspartic protease (3)",  "Aspartic proteinase (4)","Aspartic proteinase (5)","Aspartic proteinase (6)", "Cysteine protease (1)","Cysteine protease (2)", "Cysteine proteinase (3)","Cysteine protease (5)")))

proteolysis_all_exp_HM<-ggplot(proteolysis_all_exp_long, aes(x = Time_Points, y = Protein)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = Value), colour = "darkgrey") +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = HM_colors, na.value = "white", 
                       guide = guide_colorbar(frame.colour = "darkgrey", frame.linewidth = 0.2, 
                                              ticks.colour = "darkgrey", ticks.linewidth = 0.2)) +  # Add border to
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs",  "0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs" , "0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs")) +
  labs(title = "Proteolysis", 
       x = "", 
       y = "", 
       fill="z-score")+
  facet_wrap(~Variety, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +  # Separate by groups
  theme_classic()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8, family = "Arial", face = "plain"),  
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 6, family = "Arial", face = "plain"),  # Set same font for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 6, family = "Arial", face = "plain")) +  # Set same font for legend text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Update hjust value
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 6, family = "", face = "plain"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm"), # Adjust the size of the legend key here
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, vjust = 0.9, hjust = 1)) # Rotate X-axis labels
ggsave("../../../R_export/Hv3_TD2/proteolysis_AA_HS_H21599_HM.png", dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 9, scale = 0.50)
ggsave("../../../R_export/Hv3_TD2/proteolysis_AA_HS_H21599_HM.svg", dpi = 300, width = 7.8, height = 9, scale = 0.50)


#Transport proteins expressed during these time points of germination in the different varieties.  ----
#Here I did not check the original names in Barke and not checked againsts RNASeq. 
transport_all_exp <- pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_HM %>% 
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~grepl("Bidirectional sugar transporter SWEET|AtNPF|ABC transporter A |ABC transporter B |ABC transporter C |ABC transporter D ", .))) %>%
  mutate(Protein = c("SWEET15", "ABCD1" ,  "NPF31" ,  "ABCC12" , "ABCC14" , "ABCB4" ,  "ABCB9"  , "ABCB19",  "ABCB1",   "ABCB2" ,  "ABCC5",   "NPF5.10", "ABCD1(2)"  ,  "SWEET1" , "ABCB19(2)" , "NPF8.3" , "ABCB27"  , "ABCC4"  ,  "ABCB25" , "NPF2.10" ,"NPF8.2" , "ABCB20" ))

  
HM_colors <- c("cornflowerblue", "ivory", "red3")

transport_all_exp_long <- transport_all_exp %>%
  reshape2::melt(id.vars = c("Protein"),
           measure.vars = c("Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.2.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.3.Hv3_TD_100", 
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.4.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.5.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.6.Hv3_TD_100", 
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.7.Hv3_TD_100" , "Reporter.intensity.corrected.8.Hv3_TD_100",  "Reporter.intensity.corrected.9.Hv3_TD_100" ,
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.10.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.11.Hv3_TD_100" ,"Reporter.intensity.corrected.12.Hv3_TD_100",
"Reporter.intensity.corrected.13.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.14.Hv3_TD_100", "Reporter.intensity.corrected.15.Hv3_TD_100"), 
           variable.name = "Time_Points", value.name = "Value")%>%
  mutate(Variety = case_when(
    Time_Points %in% conditions[1:5] ~ "AA",
    Time_Points %in% conditions[6:10] ~ "HS",
    Time_Points %in% conditions[11:15] ~ "BK"))

transport_all_exp_long <- transport_all_exp_long %>%
  mutate(Variety = factor(Variety, levels = c("HS", "AA", "BK")))
transport_all_exp_long$Value <- as.numeric(transport_all_exp_long$Value) #convert Value in continues values
transport_all_exp_long$Protein <- factor(transport_all_exp_long$Protein, levels = rev (c("SWEET1" , "SWEET15","ABCB1","ABCB2" ,"ABCB4" , "ABCB9"  , "ABCB19", "ABCB19(2)" , "ABCB20",   "ABCB25" , "ABCB27"  , "ABCC4"  , "ABCC5",  "ABCC12" , "ABCC14" , "ABCD1" ,"ABCD1(2)"  ,    "NPF5.10","NPF31" ,   "NPF8.3" ,"NPF8.2" , "NPF2.10")))

transport_all_exp_HM<-ggplot(transport_all_exp_long, aes(x = Time_Points, y = Protein)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = Value), colour="darkgrey") +
  scale_fill_gradientn (colors = HM_colors, na.value = "white") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs",  "0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs" , "0hs",  "24hs",  "48hs", "72hs",  "96hs")) +
  labs(title = "Hormone transporters", 
       x = "", 
       y = "", 
       fill="z-score")+
  facet_wrap(~Variety, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +  # Separate by groups
  theme_classic()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, family = "Arial", face = "plain"),  
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 6, family = "Arial", face = "plain"),  # Set same font for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 6, family = "Arial", face = "plain")) +  # Set same font for legend text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Update hjust value
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 5, family = "", face = "plain"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 5),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm"), # Adjust the size of the legend key here
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, vjust = 0.9, hjust = 1)) # Rotate X-axis labels
ggsave("../../R_export/Hv3_TD2/transport_AA_H21599_HM.png", dpi = 300, width = 7.3, height = 6, scale = 0.60)

``` 

#Comparative analysis between the proteome of the three varieties during germination
The goal is to compare the proteomes of the three varieties during germination in all the time points, to see if there are differences. The ideal case would be to find that in the proteome of HS for eg. there is an enrichment in genes involved uin dormancy. Or there are for eg. a set of proteins that confer tolerance against dehydration, that is not identified in the other two varieties. in principle this analysis is based on one by one search and on a GO 3enrichment of the single sets that will form after data manipulation. 

```{r}

#Add TAUR annotation to our pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599 (important later for enrichment analysis). Prepare pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599 for enrichment analysis (remove multiple entries for each gene in the specific annotations, extract an adequate string for the annotation, etc. ) 

AraT_TAIR<- read_tsv("../../../R_Import/HvGerm_Exp3_RNASeq/AraT_TAIR.tsv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>% 
  select(-1) %>%
  mutate(TAIR = sub(";.*$", "", TAIR)) #remove rows were one uniprot entry is associated to more then one TAIR entry

pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599 <- read_csv("../../R_Data/Hv3_TD/pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2 <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599 %>%
  merge(AraT_TAIR, by.y= "Entry Name", by.x="Arabidopsis_OF", all.x=TRUE) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_BP = sub(";.*$", "", Arabidopsis_GO_BP)) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex = str_extract(Arabidopsis_GO_BP, "\\[(.*?)\\]")) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex = str_replace_all(Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex, "\\[|\\]", "")) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_MF = sub(";.*$", "", Arabidopsis_GO_MF)) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex = str_extract(Arabidopsis_GO_MF, "\\[(.*?)\\]")) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex = str_replace_all(Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex, "\\[|\\]", "")) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_CC = sub(";.*$", "", Arabidopsis_GO_CC)) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex = str_extract(Arabidopsis_GO_CC, "\\[(.*?)\\]")) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex = str_replace_all(Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex, "\\[|\\]", ""))

#Manipulate Beatrice annotated and obtain the protein expressed in each variety during germination
pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2[, 5:19] <- lapply(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2[, 5:19], function(x) ifelse(x < -5, NA, x)) #remove low abundant proteins. This increase candidate unique proteins in germination in each variety 

AA_germ <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2[, -c(10:19)] #divide the three varieties in dfs 
HS_germ <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2[, -c(5:9, 15:19)]
BK_germ <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2[, -c(5:14)]
AA_germ_F <- AA_germ[rowSums(is.na(AA_germ[, 5:9])) < 5, ] #filter entries: if not present at least 1 times on 5, you are not expressed in the variety 
HS_germ_F <- HS_germ[rowSums(is.na(HS_germ[, 5:9])) < 5, ]
BK_germ_F <- BK_germ[rowSums(is.na(BK_germ[, 5:9])) < 5, ]

#Find proteins that are unique or in common in each variety during germination
unique_AA <- setdiff(AA_germ_F$First_pGroup, union(HS_germ_F$First_pGroup, BK_germ_F$First_pGroup))
unique_HS <- setdiff(HS_germ_F$First_pGroup, union(AA_germ_F$First_pGroup, BK_germ_F$First_pGroup))
unique_BK <- setdiff(BK_germ_F$First_pGroup, union(AA_germ_F$First_pGroup, HS_germ_F$First_pGroup))

common_all <- Reduce(intersect, list(AA_germ_F$First_pGroup, HS_germ_F$First_pGroup, BK_germ_F$First_pGroup))

common_AA_HS_1 <- intersect(AA_germ_F$First_pGroup, HS_germ_F$First_pGroup)
common_AA_HS <- common_AA_HS_1[!(common_AA_HS_1 %in% common_all)]

common_AA_BK_1 <- intersect(AA_germ_F$First_pGroup, BK_germ_F$First_pGroup)
common_AA_BK <- common_AA_BK_1[!(common_AA_BK_1 %in% common_all)]

common_HS_BK_1 <- intersect(HS_germ_F$First_pGroup, BK_germ_F$First_pGroup)
common_HS_BK <- common_HS_BK_1[!(common_HS_BK_1 %in% common_all)]


#Transform all in df to easy visualisation 
unique_AA_df <- as.data.frame(unique_AA)
unique_HS_df <- as.data.frame(unique_HS)
unique_BK_df <- as.data.frame(unique_BK)
common_AA_HS_df <- as.data.frame(common_AA_HS)
common_AA_BK_df <- as.data.frame(common_AA_BK)
common_HS_BK_df <- as.data.frame(common_HS_BK)
common_all_df <- as.data.frame(common_all)

#Annotate all df to ease investigation and to then prepare a gene list 
unique_AA_df_anno <- unique_AA_df %>%
  merge(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2, by.x= "unique_AA", by.y="First_pGroup", all.x=TRUE)
unique_HS_df_anno <- unique_HS_df %>%
  merge(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2, by.x = "unique_HS", by.y = "First_pGroup", all.x = TRUE)
unique_BK_df_anno <- unique_BK_df %>%
  merge(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2, by.x = "unique_BK", by.y = "First_pGroup", all.x = TRUE)
common_AA_HS_df_anno <- common_AA_HS_df %>%
  merge(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2, by.x = "common_AA_HS", by.y = "First_pGroup", all.x = TRUE)
common_AA_BK_df_anno <- common_AA_BK_df %>%
  merge(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2, by.x = "common_AA_BK", by.y = "First_pGroup", all.x = TRUE)
common_HS_BK_df_anno <- common_HS_BK_df %>%
  merge(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2, by.x = "common_HS_BK", by.y = "First_pGroup", all.x = TRUE)
common_all_df_anno <- common_all_df %>%
  merge(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2, by.x = "common_all", by.y = "First_pGroup", all.x = TRUE)

#Obtain tables for these proteins and also the 10 most abundant
unique_AA_df_anno_tab <- unique_AA_df_anno %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  slice(c(7, 9, 3,6,48,39,23,26,30, 12)) %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover")) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white") %>%
  add_header_above(c("Unique in AA" = 5)) %>%
  column_spec(1:5, bold = TRUE)%>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/unie_A_df_anno_t.png", height = 20, width = 8)
unique_AA_df_anno_tab_m<- unique_AA_df_anno %>%
  arrange(desc(Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white") %>%
  add_header_above(c("10 most abundant unique in AA" = 6)) %>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/unie_A_df_anno_t_10.png")

unique_HS_df_anno_tab <- unique_HS_df_anno %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  slice(c(9,19,18,6,21)) %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white") %>%
  add_header_above(c("Unique in HS" = 6)) %>%
  column_spec(1:5, bold = TRUE)%>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/unique_HS_df_anno_tab.png", height = 20, width = 8)
unique_HS_df_anno_tab_m <- unique_HS_df_anno %>%
  arrange(desc(Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white") %>%
  add_header_above(c("10 most abundant unique in HS" = 6)) %>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/unique_HS_df_anno_tab10.png")

unique_BK_df_anno_tab <- unique_BK_df_anno %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  slice(25, 90, 91, 2, 32,35,97)%>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white") %>%
  add_header_above(c("Unique in BK" = 6)) %>%
  column_spec(1:6, bold = TRUE)%>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/unique_BK_df_anno_tab.png")
unique_BK_df_anno_tab_3 <- unique_BK_df_anno %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  slice(5, 12,29, 10, 20, 24, 45,82,46, 60)%>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white") %>%
  add_header_above(c("Unique in BK" = 6)) %>%
  column_spec(1:6, bold = TRUE)%>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/unique_BK_df_anno_tab3.png", width = 15, height = 40)
unique_BK_df_anno_tab_2 <- unique_BK_df_anno %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  slice(69, 65, 67,92, 47,53, 98)%>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white") %>%
  add_header_above(c("Unique in BK" = 6)) %>%
  column_spec(1:6, bold = TRUE)%>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/unique_BK_df_anno_tab2.png", width = 15, height = 40)
unique_BK_df_anno_tab_4 <- unique_BK_df_anno %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  slice(54, 56, 11,77)%>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white") %>%
  add_header_above(c("Unique in BK" = 6)) %>%
  column_spec(1:6, bold = TRUE)%>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/unique_BK_df_anno_tab4.png", width = 15, height = 40)
unique_BK_df_anno_tab_m <- unique_BK_df_anno %>%
  arrange(desc(Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white") %>%
  add_header_above(c("10 most abundant unique in BK" = 6)) %>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/unique_BK_df_anno_tab10.png")

common_AA_HS_df_anno_tab_m <- common_AA_HS_df_anno %>%
  arrange(desc(Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white") %>%
  add_header_above(c("10 most abundant common in AA and HS" = 6)) %>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/common_AA_HS_df_anno_tab_10.png")

common_AA_BK_df_anno_tab_m <- common_AA_BK_df_anno %>%
  arrange(desc(Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white") %>%
  add_header_above(c("10 most abundant common in AA and BK" = 6)) %>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/common_AA_BK_df_anno_tab_10.png")

common_HS_BK_df_anno_tab_m <- common_HS_BK_df_anno %>%
  arrange(desc(Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white") %>%
  add_header_above(c("10 most abundant common in HS and BK" = 6)) %>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/common_HS_BK_df_anno_tab_10.png")

common_all_df_anno_tab_m <- common_all_df_anno %>%
  arrange(desc(Reporter.intensity.corrected.1.Hv3_TD)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  select( "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white") %>%
  add_header_above(c("10 most abundant common in all" = 6)) %>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/common_all_df_anno_tab_10.png")


#Obtain a Venn Diagram 
venn.plot <- draw.triple.venn(7305, 7225, 7288, 7121, 7054, 7113, 6977, category = c("AA", "HS", "BK") , 
                               fill = c("dodgerblue", "coral", "lavender"),
                               alpha = c(0.6, 0.6, 0.6),
                               lwd = c(2.5, 2.5, 2),
                               cex =  ,
                               cat.cex = c(2, 2, 2))
png(filename = "../../R_export/Hv3_TD_VD_AAHSBK.png", width = 800, height = 800)
grid.draw(venn.plot)
dev.off()

#Perform an enrichment analysis on all the sets obtained. This will let me understand what the real differences and similarities are between these varieties.
#First create a universe. In my case the universe against which I want to test my unique genes are all the genes that are expressed in the experiments. Because i want to say: as compared to the genes that are expressed in the experiment, the ones that are unique in one variety, have an enrichment in a specific class?
Universe_BP <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2 %>% #genes that  expressed in the experiment, annotated with Beatrice and annotated with TAIR
  filter(!is.na(Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex)) %>% #remove genes without GOBP annotation
  filter(!is.na(TAIR)) %>% #remove genes without TAIR annotation 
  select(TAIR) #obtain a list of TAIR IDs (my Universe)

Universe_MF <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2 %>% #genes that  expressed in the experiment, annotated with Beatrice and annotated with TAIR
  filter(!is.na(Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex)) %>% #remove genes without GOBP annotation
  filter(!is.na(TAIR)) %>% #remove genes without TAIR annotation 
  select(TAIR) #obtain a list of TAIR IDs (my Universe)

Universe_CC <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2 %>% #genes that  expressed in the experiment, annotated with Beatrice and annotated with TAIR
  filter(!is.na(Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex)) %>% #remove genes without GOBP annotation
  filter(!is.na(TAIR)) %>% #remove genes without TAIR annotation 
  select(TAIR) #obtain a list of TAIR IDs (my Universe)
##Create the gene list to investigate 
#BP
unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_BP <- unique_AA_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_BP <- unique_HS_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP <- unique_BK_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_BP <- common_AA_HS_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP <- common_AA_BK_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP <- common_HS_BK_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
common_all_df_anno_geneL_BP <- common_all_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()

# MF
unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_MF <- unique_AA_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_MF <- unique_HS_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF <- unique_BK_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_MF <- common_AA_HS_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF <- common_AA_BK_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF <- common_HS_BK_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
common_all_df_anno_geneL_MF <- common_all_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()

# CC
unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_CC <- unique_AA_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_CC <- unique_HS_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC <- unique_BK_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_CC <- common_AA_HS_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC <- common_AA_BK_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC <- common_HS_BK_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()
common_all_df_anno_geneL_CC <- common_all_df_anno %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex") %>% 
  na.omit()

#Perform enrichment analysis
unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe <- enrichGO(unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_BP$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "BP", universe = Universe_BP$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe)

unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe <- enrichGO(unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_MF$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "MF", universe = Universe_MF$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe)

unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe <- enrichGO(unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_CC$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "CC", universe = Universe_CC$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe)


unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe <- enrichGO(unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_BP$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "BP", universe = Universe_BP$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")

unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe)


unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe <- enrichGO(unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "BP", universe = Universe_BP$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe)

unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe <- enrichGO(unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "CC", universe = Universe_CC$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe)


common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe <- enrichGO(common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_BP$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "BP", universe = Universe_BP$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe)

common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe <- enrichGO(common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_MF$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "MF", universe = Universe_MF$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe)

common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe <- enrichGO(common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_CC$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "CC", universe = Universe_CC$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe)


common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe <- enrichGO(common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "BP", universe = Universe_BP$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
```
