```{r}
common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe)

common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe <- enrichGO(common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "CC", universe = Universe_CC$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe)


common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe <- enrichGO(common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "BP", universe = Universe_BP$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe)

common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe <- enrichGO(common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "MF", universe = Universe_MF$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe)

common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe <- enrichGO(common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "CC", universe = Universe_CC$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe)


common_all_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe <- enrichGO(common_all_df_anno_geneL_BP$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "BP", universe = Universe_BP$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
common_all_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(common_all_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe)

common_all_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe <- enrichGO(common_all_df_anno_geneL_MF$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "MF", universe = Universe_MF$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
common_all_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(common_all_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe)

common_all_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe <- enrichGO(common_all_df_anno_geneL_CC$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "CC", universe = Universe_CC$TAIR, minGSSize = 2, pAdjustMethod = "none")
common_all_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(common_all_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe)


#Graphical merged representation of the results of this analysis ----
#For each set and type of annotation, select the first 5 most important annotations 

#UniqueAA
unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_dfm <- unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>% #order 
  slice(1:5) %>% #retrieve the first 5 entries (in this way we select just the most important functional annotations for each df)
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID) #keep just what we will need
unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_dfm <- unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>% #order 
  slice(1:5) %>% #retrieve the first 5 entries (in this way we select just the most important functional annotations for each df)
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID) #keep just what we will need
unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_dfm <- unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>% #order 
  slice(1:5) %>% #retrieve the first 5 entries (in this way we select just the most important functional annotations for each df)
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID) #keep just what we will need

# Adapt the script for unique_HS_df_anno
unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_dfm <- unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>% # Order by Count in descending order
  slice(1:5) %>% # Retrieve the first 5 entries
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID) # Keep only the needed columns
unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_dfm <- unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)
unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_dfm <- unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)

# Adapt the script for unique_BK_df_anno
unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_dfm <- unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)
unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_dfm <- unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)
unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_dfm <- unique_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)

# Adapt the script for common_AA_HS_df_anno
common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_dfm <- common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)
common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_dfm <- common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)
common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_dfm <- common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)

# Adapt the script for common_AA_BK_df_anno
common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_dfm <- common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)
common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_dfm <- common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)
common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_dfm <- common_AA_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)

# Adapt the script for common_HS_BK_df_anno
common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_dfm <- common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)
common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_dfm <- common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)
common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_dfm <- common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)

# Adapt the script for common_all_df_anno
common_all_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_dfm <- common_all_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)
common_all_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_dfm <- common_all_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)
common_all_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_dfm <- common_all_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, p.adjust, geneID)

##Combine df and make HM----
#Create a list on with iterate the merging function for GOBP, GOMF and GOCC. The datasets that are empty (no significative enrichment of any term) are excluded. The ones in which only some terms are enriched will be eventually filtered later. 
Sets_GOBP_list <- list(
  comm_AA_HS = common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_dfm,
  comm_HS_BK = common_HS_BK_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_dfm,
  unique_AA = unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_dfm,
  unique_HS = unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_dfm
)

Sets_GOMF_list <- list(
  comm_AA_HS = common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_dfm,
  unique_AA = unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_dfm,
  unique_HS = unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_MF_GOe_dfm
)
  
Sets_GOCC_list <- list(
  comm_AA_HS = common_AA_HS_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_dfm,
  unique_AA = unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_dfm,
  unique_HS = unique_HS_df_anno_geneL_CC_GOe_dfm
)

#Reduce and filter all the dataframes. In this way we create a df with the most important annotations of each df 
Hv3_SP_Sets_GOBP_merged <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "Description", all = TRUE), Sets_GOBP_list) %>%
  setNames(c("Description", 
             "comm_AA_HS", "geneID_comm_AA_HS", 
             "comm_HS_BK", "geneID_comm_HS_BK",
              "unique_AA", "geneID_unique_AA",
             "unique_HS", "geneID_unique_HS")) %>%
  select("Description", "comm_AA_HS", "comm_HS_BK", "unique_AA", "unique_HS")
Hv3_SP_Sets_GOBP_merged_long <- melt(Hv3_SP_Sets_GOBP_merged, id.vars = "Description", variable.name = "Category", value.name = "pAdj")

Hv3_SP_Sets_GOMF_merged <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "Description", all = TRUE), Sets_GOMF_list) %>%
  setNames(c("Description", 
             "comm_AA_HS", "geneID_comm_AA_HS", 
              "unique_AA", "geneID_unique_AA",
             "unique_HS", "geneID_unique_HS")) %>%
  select("Description", "comm_AA_HS", "unique_AA", "unique_HS")
Hv3_SP_Sets_GOMF_merged_long <- melt(Hv3_SP_Sets_GOMF_merged, id.vars = "Description", variable.name = "Category", value.name = "pAdj")

Hv3_SP_Sets_GOCC_merged <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "Description", all = TRUE), Sets_GOCC_list) %>%
  setNames(c("Description", 
             "comm_AA_HS", "geneID_comm_AA_HS", 
              "unique_AA", "geneID_unique_AA",
             "unique_HS", "geneID_unique_HS")) %>%
  select("Description", "comm_AA_HS", "unique_AA", "unique_HS")
Hv3_SP_Sets_GOCC_merged_long <- melt(Hv3_SP_Sets_GOCC_merged, id.vars = "Description", variable.name = "Category", value.name = "pAdj")


#HMs
custom_colors_CC <- c("lightblue", "ivory", "springgreen3")
custom_colors_BP <- c("lightblue", "ivory", "deeppink")
custom_colors_MF <- c("lightblue", "ivory", "blueviolet")

Hv3_SP_Sets_GOBP_HM <- ggplot(Hv3_SP_Sets_GOBP_merged_long, aes(x = Category, y = Description)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = pAdj), colour="white", size=0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradientn (colors = custom_colors_BP, na.value = "white") +
  labs(title = "ORA BP Sets",
       x = "",
       y = "") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, family = "", face = "plain"),  
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8, family = "", face = "plain"),  # Set same font for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8, family = "", face = "plain")) +  # Set same font for legend text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Update hjust value
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, vjust = 0.9, hjust = 1)) # Rotate X-axis labels

ggsave("../../R_export/Hv3_SP_Sets_GOBP_HM.png", dpi = 180, width = 7, height = 9)


Hv3_SP_Sets_GOMF_HM <- ggplot(Hv3_SP_Sets_GOMF_merged_long, aes(x = Category, y = Description)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = pAdj), colour="white", size=0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradientn (colors = custom_colors_MF, na.value = "white") +
  labs(title = "ORA MF Sets",
       x = "",
       y = "") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, family = "", face = "plain"),  
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8, family = "", face = "plain"),  # Set same font for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8, family = "", face = "plain")) +  # Set same font for legend text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Update hjust value
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, vjust = 0.9, hjust = 1)) # Rotate X-axis labels
ggsave("../../R_export/Hv3_SP_Sets_GOMF_HM.png", dpi = 180, width = 9, height = 14)

Hv3_SP_Sets_GOCC_HM <- ggplot(Hv3_SP_Sets_GOCC_merged_long, aes(x = Category, y = Description)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = pAdj), colour="white", size=0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradientn (colors = custom_colors_CC, na.value = "white") +
  labs(title = "ORA CC Sets",
       x = "",
       y = "") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, family = "", face = "plain"),  
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8, family = "", face = "plain"),  # Set same font for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8, family = "", face = "plain")) +  # Set same font for legend text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Update hjust value
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, vjust = 0.9, hjust = 1)) # Rotate X-axis labels
ggsave("../../R_export/Hv3_SP_Sets_GOCC_HM.png", dpi = 180, width = 7, height = 10)



##What are the proteins that are in those bars? Important to interpret the results ----

# Mod1a
unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_dfm_genes <- unique_AA_df_anno_geneL_BP_GOe_dfm %>%
  select("Description", "geneID") %>%
  separate_rows("geneID", sep = "/") %>%
  merge(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_2, by.x = "geneID", by.y = "TAIR", all.x = TRUE) %>%
  select("geneID", "Description", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames")

```

#Previous analysis were focused mainly on qualitative differences. Now we focus on quantitative differences and we try to identify the proteins that show the most straiking differences between varieties. This approach should in theory lead to the identification of a biological process that is well depicted by proteomics, that show huge differences between varieties and that can be thus used to explain what is different in different varieties, identify core genes that play a role in this process and open the path to more functional studies 

```{r}
#Read expression matrix 
pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599 <- read_csv("../../R_Data/Hv3_TD/pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

#Calculate a rowwise mean for each protein for each variety 
pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_3 <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599 %>%
  mutate_at(vars(c(4:18, 9:13, 14:18)), ~ replace(., is.na(.), -8)) %>%
  mutate(mAA = rowMeans(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599[, 4:8], na.rm = FALSE),
         mHS = rowMeans(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599[, 9:13], na.rm = FALSE),
         mBK = rowMeans(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599[, 14:18], na.rm = FALSE))

#Calculate the differences between the mean abundance of each protein in each variety 
pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_3 %>%
  mutate(D_AA_HS = mAA - mHS,
         D_AA_BK = mAA - mBK,
         D_BK_HS = mBK - mHS,
         D_BK_AA = mBK - mAA,
         D_HS_AA = mHS - mAA, 
         D_HS_BK = mHS - mBK)
pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_5<- select(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4, 4:18)
#Create an heat map to show what I did
pmap_HvTD3 <- pheatmap(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_5, 
                       labels_col = c("0hs_AA", "24hs_AA", "48hs_AA", "72hs_AA", "96hs_AA", "0hs_HS", "24hs_HS", "48hs_HS",                                                 "72hs_HS", "96hs_HS", "0hs_BK", "24hs_BK", "48hs_BK", "72hs_BK", "96hs_BK"),
                       main = "Protein groups heat map",
                       show_rownames =  FALSE,
                       cluster_cols = FALSE,
                       filename = "../../R_export/pheatmap.png")

#Obtain the 20 most differentially abundant proteins between each variety 
MDAP_BKvAA_useF <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  arrange(desc(D_BK_AA)) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1, 20, 7, 18) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white")%>%
  add_header_above(c("20 MDAP BKvAA" = 5))%>%
  column_spec(1:5, bold = TRUE)%>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/Hv3TD_MDAP_BKvAA_useF.png", width = 20, height = 10)

MDAP_BKvHS_useF <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  arrange(desc(D_BK_HS)) %>%
  head(20)%>%
  dplyr::slice(6,8,12,15,20, 13) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white")%>%
  add_header_above(c("20 MDAP BKvHS" = 5))%>%
  column_spec(1:5, bold = TRUE)%>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/Hv3TD_MDAP_BKvHS_useF.png", width = 10, height = 15)


MDAP_AAvHS <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  arrange(desc(D_AA_HS)) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  dplyr::slice (2,10,1,3,5,13,14) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white")%>%
  add_header_above(c("20 MDAP AAvHS" = 5))%>%
  column_spec(1:5, bold = TRUE)%>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/Hv3TD_MDAP_AAvHS.png", width = 20, height = 15)

MDAP_AAvBK <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  arrange(desc(D_AA_BK)) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  dplyr::slice (2,10,3) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white")%>%
  add_header_above(c("20 MDAP AAvBK" = 5))%>%
  column_spec(1:5, bold = TRUE)%>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/Hv3TD_MDAP_AAvBK.png", width = 15, height = 10)


MDAP_HSvAA <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  arrange(desc(D_HS_AA)) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  dplyr::slice (2,10) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white")%>%
  add_header_above(c("20 MDAP HSvAA" = 5))%>%
  column_spec(1:5, bold = TRUE)%>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/Hv3TD_MDAP_HSvAA.png", width = 10, height = 15)

MDAP_HSvBK <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  arrange(desc(D_HS_BK)) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  dplyr::slice (3,10) %>%
  select("Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames") %>%
  kable("html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#3B83BD", color = "white")%>%
  add_header_above(c("20 MDAP HSvBK" = 5))%>%
  column_spec(1:5, bold = TRUE)%>%
  as_image(file = "../../R_export/Hv3TD_MDAP_HSvBK.png", width = 10, height = 15)


##GSEA using Wheat annotations. Performed on the GOterms, considering the mean differential as a ranking parameter and Wheat annotations.
#Create a suitable table ----
#AA
GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select ("First_pGroup","D_AA_HS", "Wheat_GO_BP") %>% #columns of interest
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_BP)) %>% #remove proteins identified but that have no annotation for this annotation
  mutate(Wheat_GO_BP = str_extract(Wheat_GO_BP, "^[^\\[]+")) #remove  brackets to ease interpretation
GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOMF <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select ("First_pGroup","D_AA_HS", "Wheat_GO_MF") %>% #columns of interest
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_MF)) %>% #remove proteins identified but that have no annotation for this annotation
  mutate(Wheat_GO_MF = str_extract(Wheat_GO_MF, "^[^\\[]+")) #remove  brackets to ease interpretation
GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select ("First_pGroup","D_AA_HS", "Wheat_GO_CC") %>% #columns of interest
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_CC)) %>% #remove proteins identified but that have no annotation for this annotation
  mutate(Wheat_GO_CC = str_extract(Wheat_GO_CC, "^[^\\[]+")) #remove  brackets to ease interpretation

GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_AA_BK", "Wheat_GO_BP") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_BP)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_BP = str_extract(Wheat_GO_BP, "^[^\\[]+"))
GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_AA_BK", "Wheat_GO_MF") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_MF)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_MF = str_extract(Wheat_GO_MF, "^[^\\[]+"))
GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_AA_BK", "Wheat_GO_CC") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_CC)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_CC = str_extract(Wheat_GO_CC, "^[^\\[]+"))

#BK
GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_BK_HS", "Wheat_GO_BP") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_BP)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_BP = str_extract(Wheat_GO_BP, "^[^\\[]+"))
GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_BK_HS", "Wheat_GO_MF") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_MF)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_MF = str_extract(Wheat_GO_MF, "^[^\\[]+"))
GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_BK_HS", "Wheat_GO_CC") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_CC)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_CC = str_extract(Wheat_GO_CC, "^[^\\[]+"))

GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_BK_AA", "Wheat_GO_BP") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_BP)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_BP = str_extract(Wheat_GO_BP, "^[^\\[]+"))
GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_BK_AA", "Wheat_GO_MF") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_MF)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_MF = str_extract(Wheat_GO_MF, "^[^\\[]+"))
GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_BK_AA", "Wheat_GO_CC") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_CC)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_CC = str_extract(Wheat_GO_CC, "^[^\\[]+"))

#HS
GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_HS_BK", "Wheat_GO_BP") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_BP)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_BP = str_extract(Wheat_GO_BP, "^[^\\[]+"))
GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_HS_BK", "Wheat_GO_MF") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_MF)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_MF = str_extract(Wheat_GO_MF, "^[^\\[]+"))
GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_HS_BK", "Wheat_GO_CC") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_CC)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_CC = str_extract(Wheat_GO_CC, "^[^\\[]+"))

GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_HS_AA", "Wheat_GO_BP") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_BP)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_BP = str_extract(Wheat_GO_BP, "^[^\\[]+"))
GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOMF <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_HS_AA", "Wheat_GO_MF") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_MF)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_MF = str_extract(Wheat_GO_MF, "^[^\\[]+"))
GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC <- pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599_4 %>%
  select("First_pGroup", "D_HS_AA", "Wheat_GO_CC") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wheat_GO_CC)) %>%
  mutate(Wheat_GO_CC = str_extract(Wheat_GO_CC, "^[^\\[]+"))

#Create a geneList (values,ID) ----
# Gene Lists for GOBP, GOMF, and GOCC
gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP$D_AA_HS, GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP$D_AA_BK, GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP$D_BK_HS, GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP$D_BK_AA, GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP$D_HS_BK, GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP$D_HS_AA, GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP$First_pGroup)

gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOMF <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOMF$D_AA_HS, GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOMF$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF$D_AA_BK, GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF$D_BK_HS, GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF$D_BK_AA, GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF$D_HS_BK, GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOMF <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOMF$D_HS_AA, GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOMF$First_pGroup)

gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC$D_AA_HS, GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC$D_AA_BK, GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC$D_BK_HS, GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC$D_BK_AA, GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC$D_HS_BK, GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC$First_pGroup)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC <- setNames(GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC$D_HS_AA, GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC$First_pGroup)

# Sort gene lists
gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP, decreasing = TRUE)

gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOMF_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOMF, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOMF_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOMF, decreasing = TRUE)

gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC, decreasing = TRUE)
gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC_sort <- sort(gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC, decreasing = TRUE)

#Create a TERM2GENE (annotation, proteinID) for association porpouses ----
# MF (molecular function) for term 2 gene lists
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF <- GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_MF", "First_pGroup")
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF <- GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_MF", "First_pGroup")
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF <- GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_MF", "First_pGroup")
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF <- GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_MF", "First_pGroup")
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOMF <- GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOMF %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_MF", "First_pGroup")

# CC (cellular component) for term 2 gene lists
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC <- GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_CC", "First_pGroup")
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC <- GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_CC", "First_pGroup")
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC <- GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_CC", "First_pGroup")
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC <- GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_CC", "First_pGroup")
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC <- GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_CC", "First_pGroup")
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC <- GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_CC", "First_pGroup")

# BP (biological process) for term 2 gene lists
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP <- GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_BP", "First_pGroup")
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP <- GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_BP", "First_pGroup")
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP <- GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_BP", "First_pGroup")
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP <- GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_BP", "First_pGroup")
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP <- GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_BP", "First_pGroup")
T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP <- GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP %>%
  select("Wheat_GO_BP", "First_pGroup")

#Run analysis ----

GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP_run <-GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP)
GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOMF_run<-GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOMF_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOMF)
GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC_run<-GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC)
# Run analysis for AA-BK-GOBP, AA-BK-GOMF, and AA-BK-GOCC
GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP)
GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF)
GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC)

# Run analysis for BK-HS-GOBP, BK-HS-GOMF, and BK-HS-GOCC
GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP)
GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF)
GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC)

# Run analysis for BK-AA-GOBP, BK-AA-GOMF, and BK-AA-GOCC
GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP)
GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF)
GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC)

# Run analysis for HS-BK-GOBP, HS-BK-GOMF, and HS-BK-GOCC
GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP)
GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF)
GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC)

# Run analysis for HS-AA-GOBP, HS-AA-GOMF, and HS-AA-GOCC
GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP)
GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOMF_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOMF_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOMF)
GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC_run <- GSEA(gList_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC_sort, TERM2GENE = T2GENE_GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC)

# Convert the GSEA results objects to data frames ----
GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP_run)
GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOMF_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOMF_run)
GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC_run)

GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP_run)
GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF_run)
GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC_run)

GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP_run)
GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF_run)
GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC_run)

GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP_run)
GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF_run)
GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC_run)

GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP_run)
GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF_run)
GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC_run)

GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP_run)
GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOMF_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOMF_run)
GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC_df <- as.data.frame(GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC_run)

#Graphical representation merged: obtain 3 heat maps (one for GO term, each with 6 objects) ----
#For each set and type of annotation, select the first 5 most important annotations 
#AA
GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>% #order 
  slice(1:5) %>% #retrieve the first 5 entries (in this way we select just the most important functional annotations for each df)
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment) #keep just what we will need
GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>% #order 
  slice(1:5) %>% #retrieve the first 5 entries (in this way we select just the most important functional annotations for each df)
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment) #keep just what we will need

GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>% #order 
  slice(1:5) %>% #retrieve the first 5 entries (in this way we select just the most important functional annotations for each df)
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment) #keep just what we will need
GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>% #order 
  slice(1:5) %>% #retrieve the first 5 entries (in this way we select just the most important functional annotations for each df)
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment) #keep just what we will need
GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>% #order 
  slice(1:5) %>% #retrieve the first 5 entries (in this way we select just the most important functional annotations for each df)
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment) #keep just what we will need

# BK

GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment)
GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment)
GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment)

GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment)
GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment)
GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment)

# HS
GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment)
GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment)
GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment)

GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment)

GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC_dfm <- GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC_df %>%
  arrange(desc(setSize)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  select(Description, enrichmentScore, core_enrichment)
##Combine df and make HM----
#Create a list on with iterate the merging function for GOBP, GOMF and GOCC. The datasets that are empty (no significative enrichment of any term) are excluded. The ones in which only some terms are enriched will be eventually filtered later. 
# For GSEA results data frames

Sets_GOBP_lista <- list(
  MDAP_AA_HS = GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP_dfm,
  MDAP_AA_BK = GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOBP_dfm,
  MDAP_BK_HS = GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOBP_dfm,
  MDAP_BK_AA = GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOBP_dfm,
  MDAP_HS_BK = GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOBP_dfm,
  MDAP_HS_AA = GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOBP_dfm
)

Sets_GOMF_lista <- list(
  MDAP_AA_BK = GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOMF_dfm,
  MDAP_BK_HS = GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOMF_dfm,
  MDAP_BK_AA = GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOMF_dfm,
  MDAP_HS_BK = GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOMF_dfm
)

Sets_GOCC_lista <- list(
  MDAP_AA_HS = GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOCC_dfm,
  MDAP_AA_BK = GSEA_MDAP_AA_BK_GOCC_dfm,
  MDAP_BK_HS = GSEA_MDAP_BK_HS_GOCC_dfm,
  MDAP_BK_AA = GSEA_MDAP_BK_AA_GOCC_dfm,
  MDAP_HS_BK = GSEA_MDAP_HS_BK_GOCC_dfm,
  MDAP_HS_AA = GSEA_MDAP_HS_AA_GOCC_dfm
)

#Reduce and filter all the dataframes. In this way we create a df with the most important annotations of each df 
Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOBP_merge <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "Description", all = TRUE), Sets_GOBP_lista) %>%
  setNames(c("Description", 
             "MDAP_AA_HS", "geneID_MDAP_AA_HS", 
             "MDAP_AA_BK", "geneID_MDAP_AA_BK",
             "MDAP_BK_HS", "geneID_MDAP_BK_HS",
             "MDAP_BK_AA", "geneID_MDAP_BK_AA",
             "MDAP_HS_BK", "geneID_MDAP_HS_BK",
             "MDAP_HS_AA", "geneID_MDAP_HS_AA")) %>%
  select("Description", "MDAP_AA_HS", "MDAP_AA_BK", "MDAP_BK_HS")
Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOBP_merge_long <- melt(Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOBP_merge, id.vars = "Description", variable.name = "Category", value.name = "eScore")

Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOMF_merge <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "Description", all = TRUE), Sets_GOMF_lista) %>%
  setNames(c("Description", 
             "MDAP_AA_BK", "geneID_MDAP_AA_BK",
             "MDAP_BK_HS", "geneID_MDAP_BK_HS",
             "MDAP_BK_AA", "geneID_MDAP_BK_AA",
             "MDAP_HS_BK", "geneID_MDAP_HS_BK")) %>%
  select("Description", "MDAP_AA_BK", "MDAP_BK_HS")
Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOMF_merge_long <- melt(Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOMF_merge, id.vars = "Description", variable.name = "Category", value.name = "eScore")

Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOCC_merge <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "Description", all = TRUE), Sets_GOCC_lista) %>%
  setNames(c("Description", 
             "MDAP_AA_HS", "geneID_MDAP_AA_HS",
             "MDAP_AA_BK", "geneID_MDAP_AA_BK",
             "MDAP_BK_HS", "geneID_MDAP_BK_HS",
             "MDAP_BK_AA", "geneID_MDAP_BK_AA",
             "MDAP_HS_BK", "geneID_MDAP_HS_BK",
             "MDAP_HS_AA", "geneID_MDAP_HS_AA")) %>%
  select("Description", "MDAP_AA_HS", "MDAP_AA_BK", "MDAP_BK_HS")
Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOCC_merge_long <- melt(Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOCC_merge, id.vars = "Description", variable.name = "Category", value.name = "eScore")


#HMs
custom_colors_CC <- c("lightblue", "ivory", "springgreen3")
custom_colors_BP <- c("lightblue", "ivory", "deeppink")
custom_colors_MF <- c("lightblue", "ivory", "blueviolet")

Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOBP_HM <- ggplot(Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOBP_merge_long, aes(x = Category, y = Description)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = eScore), colour="white", size=0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradientn (colors = custom_colors_BP, na.value = "white") +
  labs(title = "GSEA_MDAP_BP",
       x = "",
       y = "") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, family = "", face = "plain"),  
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8, family = "", face = "plain"),  # Set same font for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8, family = "", face = "plain")) +  # Set same font for legend text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Update hjust value
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, vjust = 0.9, hjust = 1)) # Rotate X-axis labels
ggsave("../../R_export/Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOBP_HM.png", dpi = 180, width = 6, height = 8)

Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOMF_HM <- ggplot(Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOMF_merge_long, aes(x = Category, y = Description)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = eScore), colour = "white", size = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = custom_colors_MF, na.value = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "GSEA_MDAP_MF",
    x = "",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, family = "", face = "plain"),  
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8, family = "", face = "plain"),  # Set same font for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8, family = "", face = "plain")) +  # Set same font for legend text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Update hjust value
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, vjust = 0.9, hjust = 1)) # Rotate X-axis labels
ggsave("../../R_export/Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOMF_HM.png", dpi = 180, width = 6, height = 8)

Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOCC_HM <- ggplot(Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOCC_merge_long, aes(x = Category, y = Description)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = eScore), colour = "white", size = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = custom_colors_CC, na.value = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "GSEA_MDAP_CC",
    x = "",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, family = "", face = "plain"),  
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8, family = "", face = "plain"),  # Set same font for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8, family = "", face = "plain")) +  # Set same font for legend text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)),  # Update hjust value
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, vjust = 0.9, hjust = 1)) # Rotate X-axis labels
ggsave("../../R_export/Hv3TD_SP_Sets_GOCC_HM.png", dpi = 180, width = 6, height = 8)

##What are the proteins that are in those bars? Important to interpret the results ----

#AA
GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP_dfm_genes <- GSEA_MDAP_AA_HS_GOBP_dfm %>%
  select("Description", "core_enrichment") %>%
  separate_rows("core_enrichment", sep = "/") %>%
  merge(pG_main_TD3_anno_BK_HS_21599, by.x = "core_enrichment", by.y = "First_pGroup", all.x = TRUE) %>%
  select("core_enrichment", "Description", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames")

  select("Description", "core_enrichment") %>%

  select("core_enrichment", "Description", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames")

  select("Description", "core_enrichment") %>%

  select("core_enrichment", "Description", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames")

```

#Untargeted analysis 
- Idea 
  - Untargeted analysis that focuses on finding differences between genotypes regarding genes of which we not know potentially to be involved in conferring differences between varieties
- Approach
  - Make a pheatmap with zscore normalized values. 
  - Introduce filtering steps to be able to focus on more interesting genes (low row-wise variance, high row-wise variance, others?)
  - Perform an an enrichment analysis on the cluster obtained 
- Expected outcome 
  - Clusters on genes that behave differently in different samples and that have a specific functional annotation and thus identify biological processes that contribute to confer phenotypical differences between the varieties 
- Outcome 
  - Not much. Clusters do not provide a clear interpretation, just for a couple of them we can find interesting trends. GO enrichment does not provide enrichments. 
  
```{r}
#Read dfs and manipulate them----
#Read df with intensity values and annotation manually zscored
pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_zscored <- read.csv("../../../R_Data/Hv3_TD2/pG_Hv3TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_zscored.csv")
#Read df with intensity values and annotation non zscored (original)
pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_nonzscored <- read_csv("../../../R_Data/Hv3_TD2/pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599.csv")

#Remove all the NA values from both dfs
pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_zscored_noNA <- read.csv("../../../R_Data/Hv3_TD2/pG_Hv3TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_zscored.csv") %>%
  filter(!rowSums(is.na(.[2:16])) > 0) %>% #remove al the rows that have NA values  
  select(2:16)
pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_nonzscored_noNA <- read_csv("../../../R_Data/Hv3_TD2/pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599.csv") %>%
  filter(!rowSums(is.na(.[4:18])) > 0) %>% #remove al the rows that have NA values  
  select(4:18)
#Convert all the NA values in the lowest abundancy value (in this way you don't lose genes that can be potentially interesting but you assume that the NA values are present because low abundant)
pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_zscored_transfNA <- read.csv("../../../R_Data/Hv3_TD2/pG_Hv3TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_zscored.csv") %>%
  mutate_at(vars(2:16), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), -2.8, .))  %>% 
  select(2:16)

##Make pheatmaps from the different data frames to investig\ate my dataframes if they make sense ----

#Looks the best
#This phetmap clusters genes on the base of their expression  in the samples, so you can obtain cluster of genes that have a similar pattern in different samples. I am not sure which question I can answer with such approach. 
pHM_Hv3TD2_zscored_noNA <- pheatmap(pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_zscored_noNA, 
         labels_col = c("0hs_AA", "24hs_AA", "48hs_AA", "72hs_AA", "96hs_AA", "0hs_HS", "24hs_HS", "48hs_HS",                                                 "72hs_HS", "96hs_HS", "0hs_BK", "24hs_BK", "48hs_BK", "72hs_BK", "96hs_BK"),
         main = "Hv3TD2_pHM",
         scale = "none", 
         show_rownames =  FALSE,
         cutree_cols = 5,
         clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean", 
         clustering_distance_cols = 'none', 
         clustering_method = "ward.D",
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = F,
         cluster_rows = T,
         angle_col = 45,
         fontsize_row = 7,
         fontsize_col = 7,
         display_numbers = F,
         filename = "../../../R_export/Hv3_TD2/pheatmap2.png", height = 10, width = 8)

#These are pheatmaps made from the other dataframe that show that we obtain similar results using zscore manually or pheatmap performed and that we can also make pheatmaps using the conversion of NA values in arbitrary values. 
#identical to my manual method so I will use the manual method
pHM_Hv3TD2_nozscored_noNA <- pheatmap(pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_nonzscored_noNA, 
         labels_col = c("0hs_AA", "24hs_AA", "48hs_AA", "72hs_AA", "96hs_AA", "0hs_HS", "24hs_HS", "48hs_HS",                                                 "72hs_HS", "96hs_HS", "0hs_BK", "24hs_BK", "48hs_BK", "72hs_BK", "96hs_BK"),
         main = "Protein groups heat map",
         scale = "row", 
         show_rownames =  FALSE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         filename = "../../../R_export/Hv3_TD2/pheatmap3.png")

#This can be an alternative, Idk why but I don't like it so much
pHM_Hv3TD2_nozscored_tNA <- pheatmap(pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_zscored_transfNA, 
         labels_col = c("0hs_AA", "24hs_AA", "48hs_AA", "72hs_AA", "96hs_AA", "0hs_HS", "24hs_HS", "48hs_HS",                                                 "72hs_HS", "96hs_HS", "0hs_BK", "24hs_BK", "48hs_BK", "72hs_BK", "96hs_BK"),
         main = "Protein groups heat map",
         show_rownames =  FALSE,
         cluster_cols = FALSE,
         filename = "../../../R_export/Hv3_TD2/pheatmap4.png")

#Clustering on the base of rowVar ----
#To obtain which are the proteins that change the most in the three species, I calculate a rowMean and then the variance and then i rank the genes on the base of their variance. In this way I obtain the genes that change in samples

pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_nonzscored_noNA_m_var <- read_csv("../../../R_Data/Hv3_TD2/pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599.csv") %>%
  filter(!rowSums(is.na(.[4:18])) > 0) %>% 
  mutate(rowMean = rowMeans(select(., 4:18), na.rm = TRUE), #non used :) 
         rowVar = rowVars(as.matrix(select(., 4:18)), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(rowVar)) %>%  # Arrange rows in descending order of rowVar
  head(1000) %>%  # Select the first 200 rows
  select (1, 4:18) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames(var="First_pGroup") #in case I want to display the genes 

#1. This is a interesting clustering I obtain cluster of genes that are expressed before in BK, more abundant in one variety and other trends 
pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1 <- pheatmap(pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_nonzscored_noNA_m_var, 
         labels_col = c("0hs_AA", "24hs_AA", "48hs_AA", "72hs_AA", "96hs_AA", "0hs_HS", "24hs_HS", "48hs_HS",                                                 "72hs_HS", "96hs_HS", "0hs_BK", "24hs_BK", "48hs_BK", "72hs_BK", "96hs_BK"),
         main = "Hv3TD2_pHM",
         scale = "row", 
         show_rownames =  F,
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean", 
         clustering_distance_cols = 'none', 
         clustering_method = "ward.D",
         border_color = "NA",
         cluster_cols = F, 
         cluster_rows = T,
         cutree_rows = 7,
         gaps_col = c(5,10),
         angle_col = 45,
         fontsize_row = 2,
         fontsize_col = 7,
         display_numbers = F,
         filename = "../../../R_export/Hv3_TD2/pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1.png", height = 10, width = 8)

#2. This is the same but clustering also the columns, to better visualise differences between time points 
pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM2 <- pheatmap(pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_nonzscored_noNA_m_var, 
         labels_col = c("0hs_AA", "24hs_AA", "48hs_AA", "72hs_AA", "96hs_AA", "0hs_HS", "24hs_HS", "48hs_HS",                                       "72hs_HS", "96hs_HS", "0hs_BK", "24hs_BK", "48hs_BK", "72hs_BK", "96hs_BK"),
         main = "Hv3TD2_pHM",
         scale = "row", 
         show_rownames =  FALSE,
         clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean", 
         clustering_distance_cols = 'euclidean', 
         clustering_method = "ward.D",
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = T, 
         cluster_rows = T,
         cutree_rows = 9,
         cutree_cols = 7,
         angle_col = 45,
         fontsize_row = 7,
         fontsize_col = 7,
         display_numbers = F,
         filename = "../../../R_export/Hv3_TD2/pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM2.png", height = 10, width = 8)

#Extract clusters and annotate them (https://www.biostars.org/p/287512/#287518)
rownames(pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_nonzscored_noNA_m_var[pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1$tree_row[["order"]],])
Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1 <- as.data.frame(sort(cutree(pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1$tree_row, k=7)))
names(Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1)[1] <- "cluster"

pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_nonzscored_noNA <- read_csv("../../../R_Data/Hv3_TD2/pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599.csv")
Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1 <- Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1 %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "proteins") %>% #obtain again a column for the samples
  merge(pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599_nonzscored_noNA, by.x="proteins", by.y="First_pGroup", all.x=T)
#cluster are not in the same order as in the table so we have to change names 
#First we count the number of genes in each cluster, then by eye we reassign them
cluster_counts <-as.data.frame(table(Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1$cluster))
Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1$cluster <- case_when(
    Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1$cluster == 5 ~ 6,
    Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1$cluster == 7 ~ 1,
    Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1$cluster == 4 ~ 2,
    Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1$cluster == 6 ~ 5,
    Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1$cluster == 3 ~ 4,
    Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1$cluster == 1 ~ 7,
    Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1$cluster == 2 ~ 3,
    TRUE ~ Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1$cluster  # if none of the  conditions are met, keep the original value
)
#Separate clusters to then perform enrichment analysis ----
# Create separate dataframes for each cluster (I also already annotate them :) )
Clus_Hv3TD2_1 <- subset(Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1, cluster == 1) %>%
  merge(AraT_TAIR, by.y = "Entry Name", by.x = "Arabidopsis_OF", all.x = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex = str_extract_all(Arabidopsis_GO_BP, "\\[(.*?)\\]") %>%
           lapply(function(x) paste(x, collapse = ";"))
         ) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex = str_replace_all(Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex, "\\[|\\]", "")) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex = str_extract_all(Arabidopsis_GO_MF, "\\[(.*?)\\]") %>%
           lapply(function(x) paste(x, collapse = ";"))
         ) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex = str_replace_all(Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex, "\\[|\\]", "")) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex = str_extract_all(Arabidopsis_GO_CC, "\\[(.*?)\\]") %>%
           lapply(function(x) paste(x, collapse = ";"))
         ) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex = str_replace_all(Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex, "\\[|\\]", ""))

Clus_Hv3TD2_2 <- subset(Clus_pG_Hv3TD2_noZ_noNA_Fvar_pHM1, cluster == 2) %>%
  merge(AraT_TAIR, by.y = "Entry Name", by.x = "Arabidopsis_OF", all.x = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex = str_extract_all(Arabidopsis_GO_BP, "\\[(.*?)\\]") %>%
           lapply(function(x) paste(x, collapse = ";"))
         ) %>%

  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex = str_extract_all(Arabidopsis_GO_MF, "\\[(.*?)\\]") %>%
           lapply(function(x) paste(x, collapse = ";"))

           lapply(function(x) paste(x, collapse = ";"))
         ) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex = str_replace_all(Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex, "\\[|\\]", ""))

## 1. Perform an enrichment analysis on all the sets obtained. ----
#Create a universe
#Take our expressed genes, remove NA values (like we did for clustering, annotate genes with TAIR, adjust annotations for enrichGO)
AraT_TAIR<- read_tsv("../../../R_Import/HvGerm_Exp3_RNASeq/AraT_TAIR.tsv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>% 
  select(-1) %>%
  mutate(TAIR = sub(";.*$", "", TAIR)) #remove rows were one uniprot entry is associated to more then one TAIR entry

Universe <- read_csv("../../../R_Data/Hv3_TD2/pG_Hv3_TD2_anno_BK_HS_21599.csv") %>% 
  filter(rowSums(is.na(.[4:18])) == 0) %>%
  merge(AraT_TAIR, by.y = "Entry Name", by.x = "Arabidopsis_OF", all.x = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex = str_extract_all(Arabidopsis_GO_BP, "\\[(.*?)\\]") %>%
           lapply(function(x) paste(x, collapse = ";"))
         ) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex = str_replace_all(Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex, "\\[|\\]", "")) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex = str_extract_all(Arabidopsis_GO_MF, "\\[(.*?)\\]") %>%
           lapply(function(x) paste(x, collapse = ";"))
         ) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex = str_replace_all(Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex, "\\[|\\]", "")) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex = str_extract_all(Arabidopsis_GO_CC, "\\[(.*?)\\]") %>%
           lapply(function(x) paste(x, collapse = ";"))
         ) %>%
  mutate(Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex = str_replace_all(Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex, "\\[|\\]", ""))


Universe_BP <- Universe %>% #genes that  expressed in the experiment, annotated with Beatrice and annotated with TAIR
  filter(!is.na(Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex)) %>% #remove genes without GOBP annotation
  filter(!is.na(TAIR)) %>% #remove genes without TAIR annotation 
  select(TAIR) #obtain a list of TAIR IDs (my Universe)

Universe_MF <- Universe %>% #genes that  expressed in the experiment, annotated with Beatrice and annotated with TAIR
  filter(!is.na(Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex)) %>% #remove genes without GOBP annotation
  filter(!is.na(TAIR)) %>% #remove genes without TAIR annotation 
  select(TAIR) #obtain a list of TAIR IDs (my Universe)

Universe_CC <- Universe %>% #genes that  expressed in the experiment, annotated with Beatrice and annotated with TAIR
  filter(!is.na(Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex)) %>% #remove genes without GOBP annotation
  filter(!is.na(TAIR)) %>% #remove genes without TAIR annotation 
  select(TAIR) #obtain a list of TAIR IDs (my Universe)

##Create the gene list to investigate 
#BP
Clus_Hv3TD2_1_BP <- Clus_Hv3TD2_1 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_2_BP <- Clus_Hv3TD2_2 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_3_BP <- Clus_Hv3TD2_3 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_4_BP <- Clus_Hv3TD2_4 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_5_BP <- Clus_Hv3TD2_5 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_6_BP <- Clus_Hv3TD2_6 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_7_BP <- Clus_Hv3TD2_7 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_BP_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

# MF
Clus_Hv3TD2_1_MF <- Clus_Hv3TD2_1 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_2_MF <- Clus_Hv3TD2_2 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_3_MF <- Clus_Hv3TD2_3 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_4_MF <- Clus_Hv3TD2_4 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_5_MF <- Clus_Hv3TD2_5 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_6_MF <- Clus_Hv3TD2_6 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_7_MF <- Clus_Hv3TD2_7 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_MF_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

# CC
Clus_Hv3TD2_1_CC <- Clus_Hv3TD2_1 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_2_CC <- Clus_Hv3TD2_2 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_3_CC <- Clus_Hv3TD2_3 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_4_CC <- Clus_Hv3TD2_4 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_5_CC <- Clus_Hv3TD2_5 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_6_CC <- Clus_Hv3TD2_6 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex") %>%
  na.omit()

Clus_Hv3TD2_7_CC <- Clus_Hv3TD2_7 %>%
  select("TAIR", "Arabidopsis_GO_CC_ex") %>%
  na.omit()


#Perform enrichment analysis
Clus_Hv3TD2_1_BP_GOe <- enrichGO(Clus_Hv3TD2_1_BP$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "BP", universe = Universe$TAIR, minGSSize = 2)
Clus_Hv3TD2_1_BP_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(Clus_Hv3TD2_1_BP_GOe)

Clus_Hv3TD2_1_MF_GOe <- enrichGO(Clus_Hv3TD2_1_MF$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "MF", universe = Universe$TAIR, minGSSize = 2)
Clus_Hv3TD2_1_MF_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(Clus_Hv3TD2_1_MF_GOe)

Clus_Hv3TD2_1_CC_GOe <- enrichGO(Clus_Hv3TD2_1_CC$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "CC", universe = Universe$TAIR, minGSSize = 2)
Clus_Hv3TD2_1_CC_GOe_df <- as.data.frame(Clus_Hv3TD2_1_CC_GOe)
# For Cluster 2
Clus_Hv3TD2_2_BP_GOe <- enrichGO(Clus_Hv3TD2_2_BP$TAIR, OrgDb = "org.At.tair.db", keyType = "TAIR", ont = "BP", universe = Universe$TAIR, minGSSize = 2)

##What are the proteins that are in those bars? Important to interpret the results ----
Clus_Hv3TD2_1_BP_GOe_genes <- Clus_Hv3TD2_1_BP_GOe_df %>%
  select("Description", "geneID") %>%
  separate_rows("geneID", sep = "/") %>%
  merge(Universe, by.x = "geneID", by.y = "TAIR", all.x = TRUE) %>%
  select("geneID", "Description", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames")
Clus_Hv3TD2_1_MF_GOe_genes <- Clus_Hv3TD2_1_MF_GOe_df %>%
  select("Description", "geneID") %>%
  separate_rows("geneID", sep = "/") %>%
  merge(Universe, by.x = "geneID", by.y = "TAIR", all.x = TRUE) %>%
  select("geneID", "Description", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames")
Clus_Hv3TD2_1_CC_GOe_genes <- Clus_Hv3TD2_1_CC_GOe_df %>%
  select("Description", "geneID") %>%
  separate_rows("geneID", sep = "/") %>%

  select("geneID", "Description", "Barke_Pg_ProteinNames", "Wheat_ProteinNames", "Maize_ProteinNames", "Rice_ProteinNames", "Arabidopsis_ProteinNames")
```
